reviews.text: Paul represented my ex.  He made a written offer to me stating if I agreed to my ex’s demands that he would file quickly for divorce.  He signed the statement, but he then filed only for seaparation AFTER I agreed to the demands.  He negotiated in bad faith and is not trustworthy.  I have the documents to prove this.  Only after his dishonesty was exposed, he changed the filing to divorce.  He never apologized.

reviews.text:
Morris-Sockle was the fifth attorney (firm) I contacted when surprised by a potential divorce so I was definitely doing scrupulous research.  In fact, I had already potentially retained an attorney but had an uneasy feeling as they seemed to be asking me the wrong questions.  I was extremely lucky to have been put into contact with Paul Posadas, one of Morris-Sockle’s best attorneys.  I was even luckier to have his paralegal, Hannah Corcoran, assigned to my case.  After my initial interview, where all of the correct questions were asked and the focus seemed perfect, I felt I was going to be represented by the best and I retained Paul and Hannah for my case.
I am so very happy that I did so.
Paul is an amazing attorney.  His best asset is his ability to remain calm and project a positive demeanor in a situation that would be daunting to others.  This may seem that he isn’t “fighting” for you, but that is far from the truth.  Instead of becoming hot-headed (as I witnessed other attorneys do) he presents facts and truth in a manner that impresses those in positions that make decisions regarding your case.  It matters.  And he does it well.
The best part of my experience was Hannah.  She was the voice of reason for so many instances where I felt I was being wronged and wanted to lash out at my ex-spouse, or complain, or for some idiotic reason, make things harder for myself.  Hannah will provide you the perfect guidance and is very capable at explaining the situations that you may be experiencing in your case.  She will listen to you, sympathize with you, and help you when you need it.  Hannah should be your main focus with any and all matters dealing with your case.
I have read some reviews that speak about cost.  If you choose to contact Paul, a very busy attorney who is well worth the money, for every single question or comment you may have then you will run up some charges.  If you choose to contact Hannah, a highly professional paralegal, then you will save yourself a lot.  Never once did I attempt to contact her that I was not either speaking with her immediately or getting an answer to an email within a short amount of time.  So, let Paul do his job and let Hannah do hers.
I am extremely grateful for the experience I had with Paul, Hannah, and Morris-Sockle in general.  I felt I was lucky to have found them and been put into the situation I had with Paul and Hannah.  As I'm sure you know, it is a very difficult time to try and get through.  I'm really glad I had Paul and Hannah there to help me through it.  I think you will, as well.
Eric C.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great review, Eric!  We are happy that we were able to provide you with the quality representation you deserved.  Paul and Hannah are essential members of our team!

reviews.text:
Zack was such a huge help to me in my time of need.
When I first contacted him I was completely clueless on how to handle my situation and once I explained to him the details he immediately took on my case, kept me updated always, never tried to beat around the bush with me and was very straightforward but still kept me hopeful of a positive resolution for my case. I deeply appreciate his help and will always come to him first if I ever need a lawyer again.
Thank you a lot Zack!
reviews.ownerResponse: You're welcome, Taryn.  Glad I was able to help.

reviews.text: Zach Hofstad is very easy to work with, answered all of my questions incredibly quick, very dependable, and made the circumstances of my situation easier to understand.

Once I got ahold of Zack, he was prompt & straight forward in all his communications with me. Answered my phone call, my emails, my questions, always keeping me updated with my case. I highly recommend Zack Hofstad & am extremely appreciative of his work!!
THANK YOU.

Mr. Hofstad was more than helpful with my case. Although my case occurred outside his district of practice, he provided invaluable information that I would not have figured out on my own.  I now have a solid way ahead to resolve my case. I've been speaking with two other law offices for over a week in my search to find the right attorney. Mr. Hofstad is the third attorney I've spoken to, he has been the only one to provide clear and concise information that's actually making a difference.  Mr. Hofstad's advice was provided to me free of charge. I was also quoted a fair price for the service that he could provide in his district. I highly recommend Mr. Hofstad for fair and honest legal support.

Zack is a top-notch lawyer in his area of specialty. He shakes the common myth of lawyers seeking to bill endlessly for every phone call, email, and meeting by using a flat-fee model, making costs predictable and manageable. His advice is spot on, knowledge of the industry is strong and his relationships with the legal system in Thurston County is evident - all of which combines to result in the best outcome for the client.
Mr. Hofastad was extremely helpful threw out my situation. Zack was more than thorough, and very respectful.
Very fast in responding when you had a question or needed clarification on things. He was very respectful. Would highly recommend !
He was the most exceedingly , effective and efficient attorney . I would highly recommend him .
Good guy. Got my case dismissed.
♡ thanks z!
William Kogut used our services to advertise his practice and did not pay us. Mediation.com and 5 Star Review. He is also a rude obnoxious person who I do not recommended.
Pathetic and worthless. Complete abomination. Do not waste your time or money. About to retire and it shows.
The Jake is the BEST sandwich you will have anywhere. Service is awesome

I've retained Mr. Kogut for 5+ years. He has been supportive and assertive in an extremely difficult custody case. He fought hard to restore high quality parenting for the children. With his advocacy, I've witnessed kids being reunited with a parent. His communication is direct, pertinent, and concise. He responded to emails in a timely manner. For my lack of knowledge of law or custody issues, at times, his advice felt cold. However, retrospectively, his advice were legally prudent and have stood the test of time in the courtroom. His bills were mostly accurate. He reasonably and prompted corrected any billing inaccuracy. If there was an error, he was humble and responsive about it.

Mr. Kogut knows the law, & he takes it seriously. He used his intelligence and integrity to fight for us in a difficult and complex custody case. We wasted valuable resources on another attorney, & got nothing. When Kogut took over, he got it done. He answers emails promptly, so we were kept informed, & never had to guess what he was thinking.  Never underestimate an attorney who knows how to use his grit and brainpower when the time comes to navigate a trial. Thats when the rubber meets the road. He was respectful but knew the crux of the case and spoke the hard truth. We are grateful.

I give almost no 1-star ratings so a business has to be pretty bad to get that rating from me.  William Kogut advertises “If you want an attorney who will fill you with false hopes just so he or she can weasel from you a large retainer and then proceed to run up the hours on you and overbill you, you have come to the wrong place.”  This could not be further from the truth.  I won’t go in to detail but of the five lawyers I’ve had to hire in my life, he is by far the worse.  He created animosity between the two sides, rather than seeking resolution.  He was not honest to me or the other side.  I had to fire him for not responding to me or the other side and I filed a complaint with the Washington State Bar Association and of course, he lied to them so they dropped the investigation without even investigating.  Wolves watching wolves, I guess.  Buyer beware if you knock on his door in need some someone who will help you when you are down.

I have been going to Jacob's and Jacobs after I was first hit by car from behind. I am so glad I went to Jacob's and Jacob's. They let me just focus on getting my treat and healing and they track everything else. My schedule has not been the easiest to work around but no matter what. They made time to have someone answer my sometimes random question. It's clear that even with a big case load they will go out of there way reach out. Thanks I am so glad I left everything to you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience, Lena. We truly appreciate your kind words.

After an accident, our goal is to take as much stress off our clients as possible so they can focus on what matters most, healing and getting the treatment they need. Our team works hard to stay on top of the details, keep things moving forward, and make sure our clients always have someone available when questions come up.

We are grateful for the trust you placed in Jacobs and Jacobs and for allowing us to help guide you through the process. Your review means a great deal to our entire team.
-Jacobs & Jacobs Injury Law Group

reviews.text: Knowledgeable courteous staff and Attormey.  Answered all my questions and took time to explain everything. And the office dog is so sweet.

June, along with Alex, helped me through the recent probating of my brother's estate. They quickly responded to the questions I had during the process. I confess to being the type who's hit & miss when it comes to leaving voicemails, but even for those times when I didn't leave a voicemail, I always received a call back from the receptionist. I highly recommend Weppler Law Office.
Excellent services. All my questions answered. Very good staff, especially Erika. Atty Weppler is accommodating, down-to-earth, easy to talk to.
Alex in the front office is absolutely amazing, she helped my wife get her through everything after the death of her father and would definitely recommend using weppler estate law.
Excellent, thoughtful suggestions from Attorney June Weppler, and I am pleased with the efficient process and thorough updates to my will, durable & healthcare POAs.
Worked their butts off for us and made everything as easy as it could be. Thanks again for the hard work

We used June and Alex for the probate of our brother.  They were fantastic in getting everything completed and closed out.  Would definitely recommend them for any of your needs.  Thank you for everything ❤️
June is wonderful. She is kind and understanding, and helped us to understand financial planning (as well as a non attorney can).
Amazing, thoughtful, and very informative. Helped and guided us through the entire process. Would recommend and come to June and her team for all our needs if possible.

Wonderful experience here with June. She answered all of my questions, provided alternatives, and double checked I understood everything. Really makes you feel comfortable during something potentially daunting.
She was great to work with. Answered all our questions and more. Plus Sasha the dog was great too!
We had a great experience with Weppler Law setting up our estate planning needs. Information was clear, our questions were answered and the process was efficient.
Thank y for the excellent help answered all my questions
Very knowledgeable kind and quick to answer all of our questions

Weppler Law is the real deal.   We have been working with them for nearly 5 years.  June & staff have guided us through the difficult process of obtaining Medicaid and now dealing with hospice and with mom's estate.  I highly recommend June Weppler.

Creating my will was completed in a timely fashion with June clearly explaining the terms and steps along the way. I had a number of challenging variables and June clarified the options and possible scenarios, allowing me to make the best decision. I appreciate the kindness and respect I was shown and am so grateful to June and her staff.
Very nice, informative, helpful, & efficient! I highly recommend this office!
We so enjoyed our experience with Weppler law!  They made everything understandable and easy.
Second time we’ve consulted with June Weppler. Received excellent advice both times. We will definitely seek her services again, if we ever need them. Can’t recommend her enough!

June is the real deal. She'll get the job done. Be sure to ask lots of questions because June may not remember to tell you everything you need to know. There's so much information in her head that she forgets you don't know it too.

We've been exceptionally pleased with Ms. Weppler's service in perusing a complicated Medicaid approval for an elderly parent, setting up a special needs trust, and handling probate.  Throughout the process, June has been organized and on top of things, anticipating contingencies, getting things done promptly, and communicating effectively with us.  Although not necessary in our case, we had confidence that June was willing and capable of going to battle for us.  We highly recommend her for any aspect of elder law.

June Weppler helped me and my father immensely during a very stressful time. She was patient and knowledgeable, and did exactly what we needed with efficiency and a smile. My mother and I have since gone back to her for more services, and we will continue to use her for our elder law needs. I highly recommend her!

June was amazing I don't know where my family would be without her. Her knowledge and guidance was invaluable and she was fast at responding. When I first called her office left message with front desk and June called back shortly after and said I want you to come in tomorrow and she made time to get things started. We did not know where to go or if anyone could help us. My spouse has early on set dementia and we have been dealing with this on our own at home for 5 years. In April things took a turn for the worse and went down hill fast. By July we could not longer take care of him on our own and did not have the quarter of a million dollars the "memory care" facilities wanted to move him in. She explained what we needed to do and worked on our behalf to get things squared away. He is now in an adult family home where they can take care of him well. We can breath and sleep easier because of June. She got my husband set up with Medicaid, sorting out our finances, create the Will and POA etc. documents and we still have a roof over our heads which everyone else told us we had to lose. The knowledge she has is amazing and her kindness and concern make it so much more than I can express in words. June our hearts will never forget the kindness you share which gives you so much passion that you put into your work. THANK YOU! Sandy Rosscup
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words. You are a trooper, and I am very glad that I could be there for you when you needed help.

reviews.text: Elder Law attorney June Weppler provided very helpful information. Now I have peace of mind and my end-of-life wishes are known.

We have used her services multiple times and she has always been fantastic and prompt.

reviews.text:
I have neen remiss in giving Ms. Knight her due praise.
She was relentless, working on my case for EIGHT! years,  in which we prevailed.
I would have been sunk in the first year without her knowledge and expertise.

Elizabeth Knight and her associates really are competent in all they do, I have used her knowledge on 3 different times, she is the only Attorney I will use, if it is something she doesn't do, she will direct you in the right direction. I'm very happy I gave her a call, and you will also.
Gina Bissell was absolutely terrific in getting me through a divorce. With more than 30 years in family law, she knows her stuff, and it shows!

Gina is an exceptionally skilled and highly experienced attorney. A graduate of Gonzaga University School of Law with 33 years of practice, she has an in-depth understanding of the legal system and court procedures.

Her expertise is truly outstanding，she has impeccable logic, sharp judgment, and an incredible memory for case details. Every time I asked her a question, she answered instantly and accurately, without even needing to check any documents. She handled my case with the highest level of professionalism, ensuring the best outcome for me and my child.

She is honest, reliable, and absolutely trustworthy. Her fees are transparent and reasonable, with no hidden costs. She and her assistant stood by me through my most difficult times, providing unwavering support and reassurance.

If you need a truly professional, strong, and dependable attorney, Gina is the best choice. I highly recommend her!
Just had a great conversation and looking forward to the consultation.

I highly recommend Gina Bissell to anyone navigating divorce. Her expertise in family law and her honest approach significantly simplified a challenging process. From the very beginning, she listened to my concerns, offered clear guidance, and guided me through every step. Her support and dedication proved invaluable, and I am grateful for the successful outcome that I couldn't have achieved without her.

Going through a tricky divorce with kids and a house involved. She helped me navigate with a clear mind and I feel good about how fair everything came out. Her son is also personable.  and I felt like i had a team supporting me.

Gina was so amazing in my divorce/custody case. She really pays attention to detail and is extremely knowledgeable. I couldn’t have been more happy with her professionalism. The retainer is a bit more then some other local firms, but she is worth it!

We had questions about insurance following a theft and arson fire that destroyed our older mobile home and garage. We had coverage for $97,000 for contents, along with up to two years of living expenses while getting a replacement home, along with coverage for the dwelling itself. Our field agent from the insurance company told us to separate the theft losses from the fire losses because the $97,000 in coverage would apply separately to the theft loss and to the fire loss.
Mr Edwards was shocked that the insurance company would consider those seperate claims, and expected them to make us a cash offer to settle the entire claim of somewhere around $75,000 which he recommended that we accept as complete payment for the claim.  Coverage for theft of guns was limited to $2,500, but we also had fire damage to a dozen guns that were not stolen. He said that I was limited to the $2,500 yet the policy is very clear that the limit was for THEFT, and the insurance company ia paying for restoration of the guns about the $2,500. To date the insurance has paid us about $175,000 and we expect to get another $20,000 or so for replacement compensation.
Mr Edwards made us feel like we have zero rights, and that we were at the complete mercy of the insurance company. Honestly, I said to my wife as we left his office, "we need to talk to another attorney" because his advice was so concerning to me. We did talk to another attorney a week or two later that gave us advice that was about 180 degrees opposite to what was recommended by Mr Edwards.
Lost 14 months of my life and pressuring to take felony charges.
Karl helped me a lot and I have nothing but good things to say about him!

We are business brokers and Sierra has helped us close multiple transactions and she is utterly delightful to work with. Super prompt, meticulous attention to detail kind and professional. Very reasonable fees. I'm not sure what else you could ask for! Highly recommend!!

I'm so grateful for Brent's assistance. He was upfront about not being able to take my case due to jurisdiction, but he still took the time to offer valuable guidance. His advice was exactly what I needed to figure out my next steps regarding a complex multi-year legal issue. It's been difficult finding the right attorney so it was refreshing to be connected to Brent who was willing to help without any expectation.

I'm also very grateful to the Jordan Harbinger Podcast for introducing me to their network of experts who are truly outstanding, knowledgeable, and genuinely helpful, like Dille Law, PLLC with a commitment to helping people without judgement. Thank you so much!
Great law office.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Excellent consultation and strategy for a complex trust issue. Brent took time to understand the nuances of my situation and immediately grasped the legal obstacles I was facing with remainder beneficiary provisions.
What impressed me most was his knowledge of TEDRA (Trust and Estate Dispute Resolution Act) and creative approach to solving trust administration problems. He laid out a clear strategy and timeline, explaining exactly what documentation would be needed and how he'd approach the other parties involved.
Brent is proactive about follow-up and communication - no waiting around wondering what's happening with your case. His pricing was fair and transparent upfront, which I appreciated.
He clearly understands both the legal technicalities and the human side of estate planning issues. Felt confident leaving the meeting that he knew how to navigate the process effectively.
Highly recommend for anyone dealing with trust or estate complications that need creative legal solutions.

I had really high hopes for Dille Law and specifically Garrett when they agreed to help me, Garett would even text me directly whenI need help but over time they moved twice and he promised he would take my case to court he just abandoned my case and stopped talking. Now so have to find a new attorney, don’t ask me about the paralegal Sierra, she feels like she can say anything she wants to to you the client. I don’t leave bad review or reviews at all but Garrett and Dille Law promised a lot and delivered nothing. I will not and cannot recommend them

I got chucked around to different people explaining my issue 3 times until the lawyer said that my issue (which was that the house that was sold to me had inflated square footage) was like knowing the difference between orange and red. It was a demeaning experience.

Brent and his team did a wonderful job helping our family navigate the complexities of estate law.  The Dille team gave us peace of mind and confidence to take it day by day. Highly recommend Dille Law!
It is hit and miss. Depends on situation and day
Extremely knowledge and helpful staff. My go to for real estate legal issues.

They walked us through every step and even took the time to look over other items that another firm had done which we felt were not satisfactory.   They never denied our calls, replied immediately if they didn't pick up, and were patient with ALL of our questions.  We look forward to working with them in the future!
Doing our will again. Thank you Brent.
Very Professional, and thorough... Thank you!!!

My mom is 92 and just now letting me see her estate planning Mr.Bryce Dille prepared for her in 2015...I am no attorney and did not have a clue what to do. I called his office and he called back and was so kind, answered every single question I had..We were on the phone for quite sometime.. great help!
Great service, friendly and knowledgeable.
Bryce Dille is helping me with a contractor who did shoddy workmanship on my shop floor.  So far, everything is going well
Mr. Dille has represented our family and our interests for a decade now and there is no one I would trust more to do so...
Great services

I am going to go ahead and give Attorney Mr. Coker a 1 star rating. It is currently Friday, 10-31-25. Have been dealing with a CDL "refusal to test" issue with FMCSA Clearinghouse. Had to do with a helicopter aviation company based out of Thurston County. Needed an employment attorney. First made contact with him around October 7th, $200 consult fee. I took his advice about what to do, and basically it didn't work out for me. His advice didn't work out for me. Been trying to get ahold of him all week, since Monday. He finally calls me at 8am in the morning on Wednesday and leaves a voice-mail. I then proceed to try and get in contact with him the same day, Wednesday, then all thru Thursday and Friday via calling the office and e-mail. Nothing. Na-da. It is currently Friday. How hard is it to take 5 minutes out of your day and return a phone call or reply to an e-mail?

I need a lawyer and it took some time finding anyone that would even listen to me. Finally I called this place, the receptionist listened to me which I was very grateful for, then told me I made the right decision calling and then she said "Normally we charge a $200 consultation fee, but you dont need to pay that right away, just come in and talk to us ok" is exactly what she said, so I stopped looking for a lawyer and waited until today. Once I got to their office, the receptionist (probably the same person) told me that I DO need to pay the $200 consultation fee and even looked slightly displeased to hear me echo what I originally heard her say. Im really confused now and honestly upset that I was misinformed probably by the same woman, and had my time wasted. Hope this review helps someone else.

I’ve gone to Coker more than once for employment consultations. He offered little advice and ended up saying he usually represents employers or unions and I should file a complaint to the EEOC. Don’t waste your money.

Words cannot fully express the positive experience I had with the representation provided by Younglove Coker & Rhodes, PLLC. My representative, Gregory M. Rhodes, demonstrated transparency, authenticity, cultural humility and genuine compassion from the very beginning. He was consistently mindful and respectful of my emotional well-being throughout the process.

The staff maintained clear and consistent communication, and the overall environment was welcoming and professional. Based on my observations, other clients also appeared satisfied with the quality of care and service they received.

I sincerely thank YC&R for guiding me through such an emotionally challenging time with integrity and empathy.

Thank you,

Rion L Tisino
Greg has shown to consistently provide sound and reasonable legal advice.  He responds in a timely manner and it's obvious he truly cares about doing the right thing.  Excellent attorney.

Be mindful! I scheduled an appointment for a consultation with Mr. Coker. When I arrived to my appointment I was told I would be seen by someone else. Unfortunately, the young apprentice was not helpful at all and I wasted my money. Won’t go back.
Update: Had a follow-up appointment with Mr. Cooker. He is friendly, knowledgeable and detailed and gave me very helpful information.
Very honest and dose the job right! Blessed!

I was walked in on while pumping at work. I went here for help. The lawyer looked up the wrong law and said there was nothing he could do…. Yeah because you looked up a completely different law regarding breastfeeding and pumping. The law that pertains to my case is RCW 43.10.005 (viii). The one he looked up was RCW 43.70.640 which only applies to places of business that want a "infant-friendly" on its promotional materials. The whole experience with this law office felt like a waste of my time talking with a lawyer that is not able.

Horrible experience all around. $200 consultation fee upfront, and Mr. Younglove wasn't even taking our case seriously despite all the evidence and witnesses we had. He was actually discouraging us from suing because we "wouldn't be getting a lot back" in missing/lost wages and told us to wait and see what L&I did. But, if we got more people who were also missing wages to join in, he might reconsider. Translation: "You're not worth my time because I'd barely make any money off your case." He takes 33% - 40% of whatever the client is awarded, but only if they win. And, no. You don't get your $200 back if he decides not to take your case.
Very professional
Greg Rhodes helped me

Was referred to this law firm by someone and told they were really good.shouldnt have wasted my time bothering to even call. Didnt have the time to take my son's case. So they refer me to a couple of idiots from the county that
my son's charges are out of. Seriously thinking I would imagine that I'm from Arizona because that's where I live. Wrong I know both the attorneys that they referred me to. What a disgrace. I wouldn't pay either one of these attorneys  a $1000.00 dollars let alone $25,000.00. wasn't asking to waste my money on nothing but failure.. Thanks for the great help..
Responsive firm, Mr. Younglove was very knowledgeable and reassuring in dealing with our problem.
Highest level of legal representation you can get in Thurston County with attorney's that know their law and care about their clients with professionalism.
Attorney Chris Coker is an honest man with integrity. He heard my case and tried every avenue of approach.  He is my go to guy for any future legal matters.

Ed Younglove took my case on contigency then dropped it just before my case went to trial, too late for anyone else to take over. Completely screwed my case - would have been better had he not taken it. Avoid this attorney if you are smart.
If you need legit legal advice or services. This is the spot. Chris coker was key
Great staff
Very good advice

Chris Coker is the best Criminal Defense and DUI lawyer in Oly.  Easy to work with and Dependable.  He has helped me through a lot of legal situations and always been there to help me.  He is a good man and I can't reccomend him enough.
Excellent staff!

Attorney Greg Rhodes’s  dedication and savy thinking changed the course of my life. Greg and his firm are the best of the best, and I can say this based off my win!!! Thanks Greg for all your dedication to my case. My 2019 year will be best one yet!!!

Melanie was our attorney for both of our private adoptions.  Without question - one of the people I trust most in the world.  My experience working with her was that she is an outstanding professional and advocate in every sense.  Without qualification - I recommend her for anything you may need. Without her - our family would not be as it is now.  Melanie is not only an outstanding attorney, but a wonderful human as well.
Melanie Hantze goes 10 miles when you only expect 5. She has done several different issues for me and I feel priviledged to have her represent me and my family.

In about 1992 or '93 I paid Melanie to get a divorce. She kept sending me notes and leaving voice mails stating we had to discuss this matter more and charged me $75. every time I responded. This went on for a while. It drove the price of a simple divorce sky high. We went to court, he didn't show up and the judge granted the divorce. Melanie never drew up the papers or just didn't mail them to me. Life went on and here it is almost 2018 and I still don't have divorce papers!! I never even checked to see if I am divorced. I was just so glad to be done. Don't seek her out for this matter.I lived in McMinnville at the time. Formerly, Linda s Lesh Thomas

Lauren Pittman was introduced to my parents quite a few years back. She is one of the best in the industry. She is thorough, knowledgeable, and caring. She is the whole package. I highly recommend her.
professional, knowledgeable, convenient location

One word: incompetent. Rude and insensitive. I don’t like repeating myself, yet I had to do it several times before I could even speak with an attorney. The person taking my information was incredibly incompetent.
The crew at lifetime legal is thorough and incredibly smart. We look forward to finishing out our proceedings there with our will and trust. Thank you for being amazing professionals.
Very informative and helpful.

Since then we've used her services for our own estate planning, with updates as needed.  You simply will not find a kinder individual who will work with you, and for you.  A  true professional with immense knowledge in her field, and a willingness to go above and beyond.  Highly recommend.

We first worked with Lauren Pitman  ten years ago to update our will since our children were grown, as well as to clarify our intentions with our assets.  Lauren is friendly, thorough, made the process easy.  She assisted us and prepared legal documents that will carry us to our end. If we need legal assistance, Lauren Pitman is our first call.  We also refer family and friends to her.

My wife and I used Lauren Pitman a few years back and loved her service.  She was kind, empathetic and most importantly, knowledgeable.  She is a true master of her craft.  We were so pleased with her that we have been referring her to our friends and family and they have all had the same wonderful experience with her services that we did.  If you need legal assistance, stop looking elsewhere and go with Lauren Pitman, you won’t regret it!
Andrea Huff and her paralegal Alyssa were very kind and awesome to work with, can't recommend highly enough!

I appreciate Lauren Pitman and the entire team at Lifetime Legal. They work on issues that are complex and can be emotional, and created solutions that are streamlined and straightforward. I felt well supported and seen throughout the whole process. I can’t recommend them highly enough.

Hired them to deal with my father's estate and probate. I appreciate the help with it but man there is zero communication. I had called and called and called some more. Of course I should be called back but never heard nothing. I hope to get to the bottom of it at some point. Definitely not recommending or hiring their services again. I know it's a lot to deal with but I think it's their specialty. I wish better luck to all else.
Left message, never returned my phone call.

Well, if you need a lawyer to set up your will or for estate planning, Pitman will do right by you, at lawyer cost.  Youch!  But they seem to have done a good job, so in our next life we will employ them again.
Excellent law firm.
Our family has been Andrea Huff, Esq. clients for over 10 years. As circumstances change and our estate plan changes everything is handled quickly and at reasonable cost. Bravo!

The attorney seemed knowledgeable and had good ideas for how to structure our wills.

However, administratively, the office had problems.  Correspondence and the initial draft of documents sent to us had numerous errors.  One last name was misspelled on multiple pages in different ways.  Another last name was misspelled on one page.  A birthdate was correct on one page but incorrect on another.  And there were a few other typos/misspellings.  The bill for this work noted that three people in the office (the attorney, a paralegal, and someone else) had reviewed it before sending it to us.  How could all three miss what one of them later admitted were glaring errors?  How carefully did they review the work?

The check I wrote for the first bill was misplaced or forgotten in the office for two months.  They thought I hadn't paid them and sent me a new bill that included an interest charge for the "unpaid" bill.  Only when I insisted I had hand-delivered the check two months earlier did they find it in the office.

I've had wills prepared and updated in the last 30 years by other legal offices and had no problems.  If I had to do it again, I would not choose Lifetime Legal.
She's not in when I need her, my business is always put on hold.

I called Brown and Seelye crying because I am a single mom and it’s right before Christmas. Not only would we struggle but we would be at risk for losing our apartment.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words! We’re glad to hear you found us friendly and efficient. We truly appreciate your recommendation and are grateful you chose Brown & Seelye. If you ever need assistance in the future, we’re here to help.

reviews.text: I just wrapped up a  meeting and it was great. Thank you everyone, your guidance and support empowered me every step of the way and I'm thrilled for a fresh start! I highly recommend Brown and Seelye and I will enthusiastically refer my friends as well. I appreciate you all. ❤️😃😊
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing such a wonderful message! We’re thrilled to hear that your meeting went well and that you felt supported and empowered throughout the entire process. Helping clients move toward a confident fresh start is exactly why we do what we do. We truly appreciate your recommendation and your willingness to refer others. Thank you again for trusting Brown & Seelye—wishing you all the best moving forward! ❤️
Thank you!

reviews.text: Brown and Seelye were amazing in helping us through this stressful process. Always advising us on what would be best and how to move forward! Would highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: We truly appreciate your feedback! ⚖️ Our team is dedicated to helping clients navigate the process with confidence, and we’re happy to hear you felt supported. ✅ Thank you for recommending us! —Brown & Seelye

reviews.text: I would like to say thank you so much for everything you have done to help me with my situation. You eased  all my stress and anxiety about what to do, and how to file. U got me through this time, very easy and quickly. I would highly recommend anyone to your service! You are amazing,b thank you!!
reviews.ownerResponse: We’re so happy to hear we could take the stress off your shoulders and guide you through quickly and easily. 😊📄⚖️ Thank you for trusting us and for recommending our services—it means so much! 💬 —Brown & Seelye

reviews.text: Brown and Seelye handled my case and Ellen Brown made me feel very comfortable through this uncomfortable time. This wasn’t something I wanted to have happen but unfortunately it was necessary. All their requests were detailedly laid out and easy to understand and easy to get the info they needed to them. The process went much more smoothly than I anticipated and faster than I thought it would too! I highly recommend Brown and Seelye.
reviews.ownerResponse: We truly appreciate your kind words! ⚖️ Our goal is to make the process as clear and stress-free as possible, and we’re happy to hear it went more smoothly and quickly than expected. ✅ Thank you for trusting us and for your recommendation! —Brown & Seelye

reviews.text: Called three days, "out of the office"
Rude people. Mark likes to hang up on you mid phone call. These people don't care,  and they won't care. Avoid them like the plague!

I wanted to give a shout out to Tim Friedman. Attorneys are very busy, especially the good ones. Finally got a call back from Tim today for a free short consultation on an important matter. Tim was very professional and courteous, even though my inquiry was not inline the expertise of their practice. Thank you. I appreciate your time and the input you provided me.

Matt was the attorney on my case and he did an INCREDIBLE job for me. I am forever indebted to him and to Christine, working with this firm. Throughout my whole process working with Matt, things were communicated to me clearly and with such a great amount of care. Matt recovered almost triple of what I was expecting and I couldn’t ask for better representation for my case. I’m in shock with how my case was handled so smoothly and I will always recommend this firm for any matter I need representation for. From the bottom of my heart, I thank Matt and Christine for fighting hard for what they felt I deserved in this case and I’m so grateful I had Matt on my side in the end! Thank you!

Got completely and utterly screwed back in 2017 regarding a car accident case that was not my fault. Years later I am still dealing with the result of the injuries and pain I suffered from another persons recklessness!
Insanely good communication, great assistance. Overall extremely excellent and professional.
Compassionate, caring professionals.  Tim and Shana really went to bat for us, securing an excellent outcome! So pleased we chose Ron Meyers and Associates.
Fantastic, kind, empathetic, responsive, and highly effective attorneys. I am so thankful that I chose Ron Meyers and Associates. I cannot praise them highly enough.

Caring, compassionate, thorough, professional are just some of the great values that Ron Meyers and Associates have.  They handled my case efficiently and fought for a good outcome.  They will be supportive of you and your family during what can be a difficult time for you.  I cannot recommend them highly enough.  It was a great pleasure working with their entire team.  You cannot go wrong having Ron Meyers and Associates on your side. Don't look elsewhere.  They are the very best!

Wow! I don’t have the words to explain how Thankful I am to have had Matt and Constance on my team. They kept in constant contact throughout this entire ordeal and they never disappointed me ONCE. In fact, they constantly kept me in good graces - especially during the hardest time of my entire life. If you’re in Thurston and you need a good lawyer for a personal injury.. please do not hesitate to call Ron Meyers & Associates.

They got me treatment set up right away, answered every single one of my questions and focused on my concerns and helped me fight. I am forever and ever thankful for them!

Matt Johnson and his paralegal Yovanna Duplechain did a great job in settling my case.  They were very responsive in returning calls and kept me up to date on my case.  I would highly recommend them if the need would ever arise.

I was referred to Ron Meyers by my union President and another fellow firefighter.  It was a great decision.  Ron and Mindy have been very professional.  I could not have chosen a better firm to represent me.  I believe they are the best!  In my situation, I have cancerous lymphoma. It was necessary to get radiation treatment for it.  The radiation treatment has caused numerous and serious degrading effects on me.  I am up against a self-insured city and their insurance manager who appear to do everything in their power to get out of paying for legitimate claims.  Ron and Mindy are not allowing them to do that.  THANK YOU Ron and Mindy!

Ron Meyer and his team are nothing but professional, meticulous, tough  and personable. In my case my employer denied a presumptive disease claim for malignant melanoma which I contracted as a consequence of my 35 years as a professional firefighter. He and his staff took the case all the way to the Washington State Supreme Court where we prevailed over the municipality. Ron has an acute, personal, knowledge of the hazards associated with firefighting which allows him to argue the exposure potentials facing all firefighters. All of his staff were tenacious and didn't back down on anything at all. I have the utmost respect and appreciation for this firm, especially Ron, Tim and Mindy. Thanks you guys!

I didn't think I needed a lawyer after my heart attack, but I had several fellow firefighters tell me, "Get Ron Meyers!" I did, and am I glad I did. The city would have walked all over me. Ron and his associate Mindy fought for me and are fluent in legalese. Most of the time I had no idea what the official paperwork was saying. The words were English but everything else was foreign. Mindy always had time for me whenever I called and patiently explained everything until I understood. Ron was in the legislature and helped write the law that affected me, so he knew all the ins and outs and nuances of it.They both helped with the small (to me) things that would have made a huge difference in the outcome if I had simply used the wrong word in the paperwork I had to fill out or interviews I had to attend. I can't thank or recommend them enough. Thank you Ron. Thank you Mindy.
Very kind and treated with dignity..
Great Lawyer, very personable, down to earth , connects with his clients

So thankful to have local attorneys that work as hard as they do at Ron Meyers and Associates! Their team is so communicative and helpful! If you or someone you know is looking for a wonderful personal injury attorney, please come see this team of experts! I personally work close with them on multiple cases and they are so good hearted and super easy to work with. I can't praise these guys enough! From the Attorneys, to the Paralegals, to the Front Desk staff! They are all fantastic!

I was referred to Ron Meyers and Associates.  In the beginning I didn't feel that I was being taken seriously or heard on the concerns that I had about my case.  Matt Johnson and his assistant Yovana took the time to understand my frustration, addressed my concerns, which allowed us all to communicate very well moving forward through the rest of my case because they really do care.  They did a very good job for me on a tough case and I wouldn't hesitate to refer anyone to this office.  Be honest about what your expectations and hopes are, and understand that most cases take time to be handled correctly.  Thank you Matt and Yovana.
I left two messages with Shawna in the past two weeks. Not a single phone call back. I’ll move on to someone that wants my business. If I could leave less than one star, I would.

Ron and his staff were great, and represented me very capably. They are obviously knowledgeable about personal injury. I was very happy with the outcomes they got for me, and I always felt like I was treated with care, respect, and kindness. I would highly recommend Ron's team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We represent wonderful people in situations no one would willingly endure. It is a privilege to do what we do. We know that. We try to the best we can in every circumstance. It helps that we love people.
Thank you!
Ron

reviews.text: At a time in my life when my whole world was turned upside down by someone else's negligence, Ron and his staff came to my rescue.  The were successful in taking on one of the biggest organizations in the State of Washington on my behalf.  I would recommend them to anyone who feels they have no where to turn.  They will listen and they will be honest with you.  Thanks, Ron, Shanna and Tim.
reviews.ownerResponse: We try to put ourselves in the position of our client in every case. No one would go through what our clients go through if there was an alternative. The civil justice system makes individuals the equal to billion dollar businesses and governments. We love what we do. Many of our clients are wonderful at helping us help them when all they want is to get life back the way it was before someone hurt them. Thank you! Ron

reviews.text:
THE APPRECIATION  WITH RON MEYERS

I would like to express my appreciation with Ron Meyers and Associates PLLC.
They took my case and emphasized from the beginning that the primary concern 	was my health and getting back to normal.
They told me who I should respond to and if in doubt call them and they would
let me know what to do.  They did that very well.  I was receiving many phone
calls from third parties and was very frustrated but his office handled it well.
I had many questions and I contacted the office occasionally and they not only
answered all of my questions but did not charge me extra for any of that.
He always had time for me even though he had a busy schedule.
The office was very friendly and prompt when I went there.
My case took 2 years but they encouraged me to remain patient and they would
let me know when it was time for it to close.
The paralegals in the office were very helpful and all were prompt in returning my
phone calls and answered my questions in detail.
I was happy with the settlement agreement in the end.
I would recommend Ron Meyers to any of my friends who were in a similar
situation.  In fact, I have already sent a couple of people to his office.  His
The people I recommended to see him were happy with his work and appreciated
me referring him to them.   Mila Jones     January, 2015

Nobody better for on the job injury issues.  Ron has helped many firefighters and police officers over the last 27 years.  He has represented and won benefits for our our members that would have been denied without his help. My experience is that Ron Meyers & Associates will work very hard and effectively for you.  They have a unique understanding of the labor laws and how they protect you. He gets results.  I would give him MORE than 5 stars if I could!

After a car accident I called Ron Meyers & Assoc. they were professional and kind and guided me through the whole process. Ron's knowledge and compassion made a huge impact on how my case was handled. They communicated with me through the process and I never felt like just a client. I would recommend Ron Meyers & Assoc. to anyone!! The settlement changed my life and I have Ron and his staff to thank for it! Thank you Ron!!!

I cannot recommend Attorney Ben Cushman enough. I came to him completely overwhelmed after my former property management tried to charge me thousands of dollars in wrongful move-out fees. I felt taken advantage of and had no idea what my rights were.

Ben was calm, patient, and incredibly knowledgeable. He walked me through my options, explained the laws in a way I could actually understand, and never once made me feel dumb for asking questions. He was honest, realistic, and clearly cared more about doing the right thing than just “running up a bill.”

Because of his help, I was able to stand up for myself, push back on charges that weren’t lawful, and finally feel some peace of mind after months of stress. If you’re dealing with a landlord or property dispute and feel scared or stuck, go to Ben. He’s exactly the kind of attorney you want in your corner: professional, respectful, responsive, and genuinely on your side.

Ben helped me a few years back and really helped me deal with slumlords. They didnt care that my apt smelled like sewer, once I notifed the AG they started coming out in the middle of the night to try and fix the BROKE SEWER LINE under the apt nextdoor. I had all the photos I thought I needed, but when I called Ben for a consult he IMMEDIATELY came over and assesed the problem himslef and started helping with the appropriate legal procedures. He helped me move into a new home and was able to settle my claim and forced them to completely fix the isse.

Took a week to respond to my email. Couldn't leave a voice message, the mail box for that number was full. Guess they are so fabulous they need to hire more help. I didn't bother to call back. They said I didn't need to unless I hadn't found anyone else.
Not impressed.
Ben is very helpful and straight forward. Highly recommend his firm.

Ben Cushman and team go above and beyond any expectation that you have! Very trustworthy, responsive, and extremely fair. Is always going to shoot you straight with all the facts but the kicker comes in to his preparation and execution on the problem you are trying to get resolved. By far the best experience and thankful for the results! He and his team are the best in the business!
They weren't able to assist my need, but their reply was fast and they even recommended another law firm.

Deschutes Law Group- Ben Cushman was the BEST attorney, I ever had. Our house didn’t produce water-lawsuit for two & half years. The firm we were working with reached out Mr.Cushman to bring us justice. Very tactful, strategic, & professional. I’m very emotional person-yet he got us peace. I went though hell. Thanks, to Deschutes Law Group got closure, justice & peace. Thank you, again

I have worked with Ben Cushman over the years on several legal matters. Ben is always thoughtful when evaluating a legal matter and always willing to tell the client what he/she needs to know even when its not what they want to hear. Ben is very skilled and will refer you to another attorney if he thinks he is not the best fit for your legal matter. Most importantly Ben does not waste your money or your time.
Wouldn't look into doing a title tranfer for me, then when on telling me he wouldn't do services I didn't ask for.

Alan Swanson is a very experienced and practical attorney.   He knows the law, has an intimate understanding of the legal system and is knowledgeable about Thurston County lawyers and judges.   He is my "go to" for legal referrals in Thurston County.  A very capable attorney with a lot of "common sense."

Mr. Drury Attorney,
Jack Hanemann  law Group
Highly recommend

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for your professional legal advice regarding my property encroachment issues. I truly appreciate the patience and persistence you demonstrated throughout this process to help save my property.

Please also extend my thanks to your supporting staff at Jack W. Hanemann Law Group for their kindness and for fostering an environment of mutual respect.

Thank You,

Charlene Bennett

I am devastated, and my blood boils. I consider this an ADA violation. Avoid this business.

I am legally-disabled for mental health. I had 30 days to file an appeal to L&I after a long court battle. I had accommodations for my mental condition from previous court. I am fighting for my life. I have been incapacitated as per my PhD psychologist's letter, in hand. There is an argument here for me being late after 30 days. I had accommodations. Incapacitated. If someone is in a coma, they cannot reply. Simple.

I asked for help composing a letter to try. This business is unwilling to try. Excuse me? You write legal documents for a living and you are REFUSING TO HELP A DISABLED MAN because paralegals kick me to the curb and refuse to render services due to the nature of my disability. The nature of my disability is I cannot keep up with calendars and administrative tasks. If you refuse help to a blind man because he is blind, this is against the law. You are refusing to help me because I can't keep up with calendars and administrative tasks. This is my limitation, like a blind man cannot see.

This is an ADA violation as far as I am concerned. I cannot represent myself. They are refusing to even try. I have a proposed order in hand that is in my favor. The final order was a loss with significant dissent. I was incapacitated and did not know / was unable to reply.

This paralegal told me the court will say no automatically, and refused to try. She refused to consider that I have accommodations from previous court, and I am disabled for mental health.  I would like to pay for services, I am disabled, and you are REFUSING services. I am late because of my disability. You are refusing service because I was late. That is refusing service because of my disability, transitively. By not accepting my payment to simply write a cover letter asking the court to hear my case, you send me to the abyss. It should be my option to lose a few hundred dollars paying someone to write a letter. I have to try.

The nature of my mental health injury: as a veteran with integrity I refused to commit fraud to US govt, was retaliated against by managers, and lost my mind on the job. And now citizens won't accept my money to write a letter. This is a refusal of service. To a disabled man who cannot do this himself. This is American citizens and businesses, closing their door to a veteran who tried to do the right thing. If American citizens and businesses close their door to those who serve overseas, and serve domestically with integrity... then we are lost. There is no point in life at all.

Want to thank a veteran with PTSD who struggles with suicidal ideation? Want to talk him off the ledge?

If you are a customer, skip this business and go on to the next one. If you are the business owner, contact me and I will revise this review if and as appropriate.

That paralegal should be fired, or if that's just policy, the business owner who directs her to refuse service to disabled veterans facing their life's biggest battle should be fired by Americans with integrity and decency.

Bradley J. Drury, Attorney at Law and his team at Jack W. Hanemann, P.S. Law office did an amazing job for one of our employees, who had a language barrier, and got his case dismissed. The judge expressed how he was very impressed with Bradley's briefing and defense. The team was professional, efficient, and exceeded our expectations. I highly recommend them!”
Thanks to Griffith, I was so happy to be in this firm. Friendly and professional staff. Thank you so much!

A very simple case was prolonged for over 2 years. Which subsequently ended with me paying out of pocket way more than I should ever have. I am anticipating that was probably the point. First time I have ever needed to hire a lawyer, and I feel nothing but a huge hole in my savings, damaged returned property, and feeling like I am the only one fighting my corner. Sad to say the stereotype lives up to reality. If you’re expecting to be treated like anything other than a paycheck, this isn’t the office for you.

Me and my spouse hired Mr. Drury to help us file a protection order against a man who was threatening and stalking our family.  With Mr. Drury's assistance we were granted the order.  We found Mr. Drury to be knowledgeable, communicative and highly effective.
Dealing with labor and industry related issues and Mr. Hanemann was extremely helpful with resources and recommendations.

Attorney Brad Drury was excellent. He was always prepared and highly knowledgeable about the law.  He was very professional inside the courtroom and respectful to the judge. This matters if you want to be listened to. Brad was also very efficient with his time as we were concerned about costs. On the appeal, which we had to have representation, Brad asked the judge for compensation to pay for his fees. The judge awarded it and mentioned that it is not often awarded because attorneys do not ask on the behalf of their client, and Brad asked for us, and it was granted. I would attain his services immediately if I ever needed them.

The wheels of justice often turn slowly but this office takes it to a new level! Paperwork being filed late on several occasions is a major problem when litigation is solely based on facts. Not a full service legal team.
My eviction went smoothly
Solid work, very efficient. Brad is willing to plan out how a matter will be handled and keeps the plan on track.

When you call this office you will get to talk to a person not a voicemail. Office staff very professional and very courteous. Mr Hanemann was very knowledgeable, personable and made you feel at ease through the whole process. Recommend highly
They are awesome!
Great people over here! Brad helped me get a case dismissed I was going through. Couldn’t be more grateful for his and everyone else’s work!
Jack Hanneman and staff are very caring, fight for what's right and help each person as if they are family.

I was referred by Washington Landlord Association to Brad Drury for an unlawful detainer.  He did an outstanding job and the tenant vacated. They have an excellent legal team.  The paralegals are especially very nice.
Very Friendly people, knowledgeable & comforting to our situation.

Changing my previous review, as Britt Donoho reached out to me regarding my issue.  She was polite and kind, spending more than 15 minutes with me on the phone going over my problem, sent follow up emails and steps to take saving me time and money.
he’s a man of integrity and I mean this he save my life He got the operation that I needed thank you jack

Jack and his staff are all amazing!! I have an l-n-i case and without him and all his staff I would have never got anything out my case I recommend him to everyone! He knows how to make things happen. I thank God he accepted my case.

It has been long in the making  - my review that is.
But it is symbolic that I just had to sit down and write this on Christmas Day this year!
First of - Merry Christmas to Jack Hanemann and his entire office and staff.
May God bless you and yours this Holiday season.

With that said - big thanks to Mr. Hanemann and Kayla Eagan.
Almost two years ago, three days before my granddaughter was born I was on my way to see my daughter and give her a boost of confidence. I was sitting at the red light on the intersection of Pacific and 348th in Federal Way.
Out of nowhere, there was a car t-boned thru the intersection and finding front bumper of my jeep. Lucky of me - I had a jeep, the angle of trajectory wasn't straight on and the impact happen to on of the hooks on front bumper. I was extremely lucky, however I blacked out and had a concussion. Of which I had no idea until later.

Without getting into detail I need to say that my insurance, well lets just say it has a lizard for a spokesperson, wasn't very receptive to my claim on fair terms.

Someone recommended Mr. Hanemann's law office to me en passing. I knew it was going to be a tough deal, since the initiating party had no insurance etc etc. without going into too much detail.

Kayla Eagan and Jack interviewed me the first time. After that I entrusted the process into their hands. I had my moments, when I was about to give in and such and settle for what could have been a minuscule portion of what I had to deal with such as pain, discomfort, missed work days and time that it took for me to restore vehicle.
Kayla reassured me that this is not the end and to trust that they would do everything to fight on my behalf for the fair deal.
AND they delivered!
Thank you so very much Mr. Hanemann and Kayla Eagan for taking care of me in this tough situation .
By the way, my granddaughter was born three days after the accident and I didn't miss that event.
One of the reasons - I knew that I was in good hands and in addition to concussion and having joyful moment of becoming a first time grandfather, I didn't have to carry on the worry of other frustrating moments of dealing with the accident.

Once again, I will recommend Mr. Hanemann's law offices because of their integrity, being client focused and getting things done.

Sincerely,

Serge. D
Quick response to a quick question and very friendly!
Great  laywer
100% recommended, Martina secured an excellent deal in my case. I am very happy. God bless you.
Amazing people to work with And got more than I was thinking.. they keep me updated on the progress of my case through the whole process.. thanks you team fielding law group!!
Best law firm I've had and made sure everything was done many phone calls and every conversation was great and well broke down so I could understand
Great law group very professional very recommended
They are super straightforward and are amazing to work with, they keep you in the loop 100% and make it as easy as it can be.
They did an excellent job representing me in my auto-accident case. I was pleased with their professionalism and communication. Would definitely recommend this to anyone seeking representation.

They helped me out so much after my car accident. I had no experience with lawyers and had never gotten in a prior accident and their whole team was patient with me and explained everything clearly to me to where I always understood what step in the process I was at. I definitely would recommend them if you are in a car accident.
So wonderful & easy to work with. They kept me updated every at every step & never failed to answer any questions. Thank you guys!
Very professional and understanding. Making sure I understood evdything.
Overall great experience!!! Great communication and knowledgeable about each and every concern i had along the process.

Fielding Law took care of everything for me so I didn't have to deal with the back and forth with the insurance companies - At the end of the day they got more than my minimum settlement and I didn't have to stress over the details. Thank you.

Everything from start to finish was fantastic! Everyone I worked with was amazing at their job and very forthcoming about all information. I felt like I was guided and given every bit of information available and never felt left in the dark at all. Fantastic, Fantastic, fantastic! Thank you fielding law!
Fielding Law Group handled my case with care & attention. The outcome was more than I expected and the time spent checking in with me was much appreciated!

I would give all stars, since my accident in 2022, it has been a long Journey, especially a rough one, but Feilding Law group has always been there to find out the best way to help! Always there when you need them and they strive for more, and the best outcome for you! Very happy with them. Always want what’s best for you and they do it very fairly! They have stayed in contact with me every step of the way. And went above and beyond the amount I was gonna settle for, I was not too sure about but they went above and beyond, appreciate every single one of them especially Chris and Shasha could not have asked for better as a team.
I recommend fielding law group... very professional, nice, and understanding of your situation.... and they got the lawsuit done in a timely manner... they actually fight to help you
Got a better settlement than I expected.

They have done a great job in helping me through these troublesome accidents and negotiations. I am grateful for the hard and dedication for their customers rights. Thanks to the entire team for over 3 years of excellent service. Sincerely, Sherman Cammack.

The whole Fielding Law Group team did an outstanding job on my case. They were and have been there for me through this long process and I appreciate each and every one of them. They never gave up on me and worked hard to ensure the best outcome possible. I am so thankful to all of them.

Had great results with TJ, got told what i could expect for my case at the beginning of negotiating and I was okay with that amount. TJ went above and beyond by getting me a little bit extra even. He stayed in touch every step of the way as well and kept me updated. Would def recommend to give them a call with your case.
From the first meeting they explained everything, very thoroughly. The team was great at communicating.

I got in a car accident as a passenger and at the time I was a full-time student with a part-time job, so I had a lot on my plate prior to the accident. My attorneys, particularly Shane, at Fielding took care of everything so that all I needed to do was focus on healing and staying on top of my school work. Everyone who worked on my case was professional and kind. The only way I could have been happier is if I didn’t get in a car accident in the first place.
reviews.ownerResponse: That's what we are here for, we handle the stress, so you can live your life with minimal interruption. It was great working for you on your case. Thank you Carolyn!

reviews.text: They worked it out!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for letting us represent you Peggy!

reviews.text: They helped me get the care I needed and made sure to stay in contact!
reviews.ownerResponse: Making sure you get the care you need is our job, thank you for choosing us to represent you!

reviews.text: They did an excellent job helping get my case settled!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for choosing us to help you with your case! It was awesome working with you Johnny

reviews.text: They were terrible. Should have went through the insurance claim all by myself. They didn’t even pay my ER bill from my settlement and I only noticed because now I have a collection because of it. Thanks for nothing fielding law group

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the wonderful 5-star review! We're honored to have earned your trust and appreciate you sharing your positive experience. We're committed to delivering excellent legal services, and we're glad we could achieve a favorable outcome for you.

reviews.text:
He took time out of his day to talk to me
About my situation without asking for any money. That in itself says a lot about this law firm thanks for the advice.

I’ve been a client of theirs for four years I have tried to get a simple divorce my ex-wife. She wants a simple divorce they have not done anything for four years every time I call they charge me for calling to explain why they haven’t done anything in four years. they say they’re waiting for something but nobody knows what they’re waiting for. they can’t ever get back to me they refuse to do what they are paid to do but they took all my money so I don’t wanna put any more money on my books because they don’t do anything but charge you for calling and complaining because it has been four years since I filed. To add they still have not done anything they try to seem like they’ve done something they have never done a thing took all my money they basically robbed me for nothing no help nothing never went to court never drew a piece of paper took all my money stay away from them they are corrupt I am reporting them to the Washington State Bar Association !!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Martin!  We worked with you for a long time and hoped to provide you with the representation you needed.  We're sorry to see this is the way you feel in the end.  We strive to provide every client with quality representation and wish that would have been your experience. If you would like to provide any more information, feel free to call us at (360) 866-7393.

reviews.text: Katrina Otto did the best job that she could have done within the parameters of the laws.   It was a painful and difficult process that resulted in the best possible outcome for me...
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the review, Ken!  We are glad that Katrina was able to help you.

reviews.text: They dragged their feet. I ended up being the respondent.  Never returned phone messages or emails. Dropped my case at the last minute. Didn't seem to care about any of my concerns. They tell you what you want to hear even if its not realistic.  I suggest finding a diferent lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: Divorce Lawyers for Men is proud of our longstanding reputation for providing quality legal representation to our clients. We regret that you were not satisfied with the representation you received.  If you are interested in speaking to our Administrator about your concerns, please feel free to contact our office at (360) 866-7393.

reviews.text: The best defense you could ask for! I highly recommend Divorce Lawyers For Men to handle all your legal affairs regarding your divorce. Let’s face it, no one gets married thinking that someday things won’t turn out as planned. But if this happens, for good or for worse, Divorce Lawyers For Men was there to help me from the beginning to end. Their team is very understanding of what you are going through, the paralegal team is super nice and works around your schedule, communication preferences, they work efficiently and while keeping in mind your budget. I was represented by Jack Brenner. Jack is committed, precise, and aggressive. You want someone like that to fight for you, your assets, your money, and time with your children, and look after YOUR BEST INTEREST ONLY. Choosing a law firm that knows the system, is sensitive to your budget, and will fight for you is very important. I did my research and interviewed many lawyers who made many promises, at first but they did not have the edge that Divorce Lawyers For Men have. Gentlemen, if you are going through a divorce, it sucks for you but things go get much better. I highly endorse Lawyers for Men, they delivered what they promised. Today, I have the time I deserve with my child, and I am NOT A VICTIM of THE EX, regarding assets, debts, alimony, or child support. Don’t let your soon to be ex stump on you. Divorce Lawyers For Men, delivered for me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the great review!

reviews.text:
Excellent Legal Representation When We Needed It Most

Fuller & Fuller Law Office provided outstanding legal services for my family during a very difficult time. My mother was hit by a car while crossing in a crosswalk, and we weren’t sure where to turn. The team at Fuller & Fuller guided us through the entire process with professionalism and compassion.

They took the time to explain everything clearly, kept us informed throughout the case, and worked diligently to secure a fair settlement for my mother’s injuries. Their knowledge of personal injury law and experience with pedestrian accident cases was evident from our first consultation.
What impressed me most was how they treated my mother with respect and dignity during her recovery, while also being tough negotiators when dealing with the insurance companies. The settlement they achieved exceeded our expectations and will help cover her medical expenses and recovery costs.
I would 100% highly recommend Fuller & Fuller Law Office to anyone who has been injured in an accident. They truly care about their clients and fight hard to get the results you deserve.

reviews.text:
During one of the most complicated and stressful events of my life I decided to contact Fuller & Fuller for help with a collision/personal injury case. In 2024 I was involved in a motorcycle (me) vs car collision. the collision cost me several thousands of dollars in healthcare and that's with top tier medical insurance. The team at this law firm was incredibly professional, straightforward, and communicative throughout the whole process. Each step in the case was explained thoroughly. I interacted with 4 people throughout the case, including Marya herself, and each person held the same level of professionalism.

Instead of having to bicker and negotiate back and forth with the insurance companies, Fuller & Fuller took the reigns and made it easy for me. All I had to do was complete my medical care and take care of myself. Every few weeks I would receive a check in call from one of the staff to keep me updated and anytime I had questions I was encouraged to reach out. What could have been a financial nightmare with tons of stress was reduced to minimal effort on my end thanks to the team.

I had doubts about hiring an attorney after my collision but I will hands down 100% recommend this law firm to any of my friends/family who are in a similar position. Fuller and Fuller has your back and I seriously don't think there is anything more they could have done to fight for me. I appreciate everything the staff did for me. Thank you!
