reviews.text:
I spent many hours and days trying to hire them to represent me for my disability case and in the end they wouldn't let me hire them until I had rounded up all the paperwork for them. I have traumatic brain injury which is why I am disabled and told them I needed help and they said that I would have to gather all the information myself. I have had other lawyers for disability before and they ALWAYS have done the paperwork. I find it really messed up to make disabled people looking for help do all the leg work so you can take 30% of their money. The lawyer herself was really nice and helpful when I spoke with her but as soon as a receptionist became my point of contact it came down to me having to do EVERYTHING just to hire them. Would have loved to work with the lawyer as she was very nice and accommodating but having such a crazy barrier to entry as making the disabled clients that are paying you do the leg work is unethical to me.

EDIT: After I wrote this review the receptionist called me back to have the lawyer get on the phone and talk down to me, demean me. Literally saying, "im not here to talk about what happened or argue, do you want my help or not?" I explained that all I wanted to do was explain my experience with her staff and move on if she was willing but she kept interrupting me dangle her help over my head. I am shocked at the way the lawyer treated me and her lack of ability to listen to a complaint about HER staff being negligent and rude to disabled customers. Additionally she "didn't recall" 2 of the 3 previous conversations and constantly interrupted me to say she never said certain things. Just really really wild experience all around, no accountability, no apologies, just her trying to act like shes above me and I should be begging and gravelling to her and her rude staff. Funny cause if you read my first comment, the THREE conversations I had with her went great. Really weird that out of no where she denies having them with me. I would not recommend anyone hire this law firm for anything, let alone something as sensitive as disabilities as they have ZERO social skills when working with the disabled and just as little compassion.  Very happy I got to see how they act before paying them anything.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry we were unable to help you Sir Matthias. I just wanted to clarify that my office DOES gather all the medical records, doctors' opinions and lay evidence for our clients. That needs to be done, however, BEFORE the hearing. You attempted to hire us after you attended your disability hearing unrepresented. We may still have been able to help with an appeal, but at a minimum I would have needed to first review the ALJ's decision to determine if there was legal error. For anyone seeking legal assistance with a Social Security disability claim, you should do so as early in the process as possible, and certainly prior to the hearing. For anyone seeking assistance with an appeal after the hearing, you would benefit from being able to provide a copy of the hearing decision and your file to the attorney you seek to hire. A disc of your file is usually provided at or before the hearing. If you do not have one, you can now access your file electronically. Start by contacting your local SSA office. Not all cases are appealable (although in my experience most are). An appellate attorney usually needs to see the records to determine if they wish to represent you. I wish you the best Sir Matthias. Be well.

reviews.text:
So, again I will state my attorney experience was great and my case was won!! However, today the phone service was inadequate. I had a follow up question. I am a former client. I will NOT refer any more business to Steve's practice. The receptionist claims she is a paralegal. I didn't want her helping me any further. The next person to get on the phone didn't know the difference between ssdi and ssi and said to call Steve at home since my mother knew him and was rude. Conveniently enough, my previous message was removed. Fix your front end, it's out of control.

**So now that you took the time to respond me, which my question is not specific to my $ amount I receive. Had my phone called be routed to someone who knew the difference between ssdi and ssi you would have gathered this. My file did not need to be pulled, which you don't have. As we know SS office has workers who don't know of how previously awarded aged cases work or they give mixed info. My question was in general that could have easily been providedd if given to a proper person. The question was based on permanent disability and being told I will never go to work and I am reviewed every 7 years. That's as permanent as one can get right? Lol. So my question is, that there are different retirement ages and amounts. This goes for anyone, hence the general question. I would reckon I am not getting my highest amount as I didn't retired at the last age possible though I am permanently disabled, because they keep changing the ages. This being an older case. I would imagine you all would have a general answer on the 62, 65, or 75 age that I should be receiving as permanently disabled/retired. Real simple. What is the payment based off. Considering you all got a 3rd in that time period you would know what pay scale they used and why. 🙄 Next time have someone take a message. It could have been done off the year and how they configured a payment compared to 2021. I am not sure, again hence my call. Maybe I should have been awarded more and you all payed more. Again, hence my call. No need to answer now, a qualified paralegal is getting back to me. They were kind enough to understand the frustration with getting a straight answer from ss and you all my previous attorney. They were more then happy and I sent them a new client.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Shimmer. Your review raises an important issue that all clients should be aware of. After we finish representation and you have been awarded benefits, we close your file and are no longer able to access your Social Security file. This is a good thing for privacy reasons. I understand that you called with questions about the amount of your benefits several years after we won your case and closed your file. This is the type of information that you can access directly from SSA. I would try calling your local SSA office, or contact them through ssa.gov. In my experience the 800# is not helpful, but your local SSA office is. Be well.

reviews.text: I filed 2 separate SSDI claims for Bipolar Disorder.  The first time I was represented by Laffoon, the second time by Maddox.  Both were useless.  My claims went all the way to the Federal Appeals level, and were denied each time.  Apparently, my psychiatrist's notes were misinterpreted by the judges.  Why the lawyers didn't catch that is a mystery to me.  It took me moving to Texas and experiencing a 4th manic episode, and filing yet again with another much more competent lawyer, to get SSDI.  When I was represented by Maddox, he even questioned my having Bipolar at all.  Don't waste your time with these hacks.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Tracy - I am so glad to hear that your new claim was approved in Texas. Your review highlights one of issues we see in many cases. The ALJs tend to "interpret" medical evidence, rather than simply taking it at face value. That is a problem that seems baked into the disability review process. Usually we win a remand when that error is pointed out to a Federal District Court Judge on appeal. I am very disappointed that we did not prevail in your appeal to FDC. But I know your disappointment far outpaces my own, and I agree that your claim should have been approved in WA. I am so sorry we lost your case.

reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Shane - Our records show that we were unable to reach you at the numbers you provided and had to withdraw for that reason. Unfortunately we cannot represent folks we cannot reach. Social Security deadlines are pretty firm, so it is very important to stay in touch with your representative. If you still need help, please feel free to give us a call. By the way, we do not get grants. The ONLY way we get paid is if we win you a back-award of benefits. Our fee is contingent on winning your claim. If we lose, you pay nothing and we receive nothing.

reviews.text: They are not well equipped to properly prepare  veterans claims and quicker hearing dates. Strongly recommend veterans do not use their services and seek someone who specializes with vets.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hi Toby - You raise a very good point. Veterans' cases are fast-tracked by the Social Security Administration, and it may be of great benefit to have your VA attorney help with your SSA claim. Oddly, while SSA fast-tracks Veterans' claims, it has also recently changed its policy about the weight to be given to VA Rating Decisions. Under new regulations SSA ALJs are not required to even mention a VA RD - even if it is 100% or TDIU!
Your review is super important to us! Thank you for taking the time to leave it!

I was arrested in the South Puget Sound area and charged with 2nd degree DV assault, a class B felony. At my first meeting, Mr. Lousteau outlined the possible outcomes of my case, potential mitigating factors, and a detailed overview of next steps.

Mr. Lousteau worked diligently over the next several months to negotiate my case with the prosecutor. His negotiations led to a favorable outcome-- either pleading guilty to 4th degree assault with no jail time, or taking pretrial diversion on the 2nd degree assault charge. I took the diversion option, and David assisted me through each step of this process over the next year.

The end result of hiring Mr. Lousteau was that my felony charge was completely dismissed. I couldn't recommend David's representation more highly for any criminal cases in the South Puget Sound area or Washington in general.

Five stars simply aren't enough to reflect the level of service Mr. Lousteau provided -  from the very beginning of my case right through to the charges being dropped and the case dismissed. The following facts are documented and I'm happy to share further details if you reach out to me directly. Donna Price was retained after the death of my grandfather. She was supposed to represent my father after his sister altered their father's Trust while he was mentally and physically declining from dementia. After the initial meeting, during which we paid a $5,000 retainer fee, we barely heard from Donna, nor did she return our calls or keep on top of any legal obligations necessary to represent my father's interests. She missed a critical 6 month deadline by failing to file papers in court necessary to protect my father's case in the matter of his father's estate. After this time, we met in person and she stated, "We will be filing a TEDRA." That never happened. It was never filed. As my grandfather's estate rolled along and property of the estate was put on the market, my father was not kept apprised of any activity or the status of his legal case was. After repeated calls, a secretary would occasionally call me back. One of them passed along a message from Donna that I could help my father to file some kind of a lien against his sister to prevent property from being sold, but also that it would have to be done on our own and we would be liable for any loss or potential losses by the estate that resulted from that action. (What did we even hire an attorney for, right?) My father ended up retaining a different law firm in Tacoma (Inge Fordham rocks, btw!) to represent him, and the attorneys at that firm were stunned to review the case and note the complete lack of action and accountability by Donna Price and Parr Price law firm. There was also a significant delay getting records and files from Donna's office to the new attorney. Not only were they were not expedited to the new law firm, I had to retrieve them myself, personally, from Donna. At that time, I was also handed an invoice with an additional $3,000 added to the $5,000 that we had already paid.  When I returned to her office to discuss it with her, she said, "You can just forget about the invoice." Needless to say, due to the inaction and irresponsibility on the part of Donna Price and the Parr Price firm, my father's rights to his father's estate were not preserved and his sister walked away with most of their father's estate, rather than the even split my grandfather intended in the decades  prior to his illness, and Donna missed my father's only opportunity to have his rights represented. Based on our personal experience, I highly recommend avoiding Donna Price and if it were possible, I would her the  negative five stars that she earned while handling my father's case.

Donna helped out our family in a difficult and complicated situation involving an estate, a badly written will (not by Donna), a trust and a confused executor. We appreciate her attention to detail, her years of knowledge and ability to explain complicated, emotional issues clearly and realistically. reviews.text: Terry Church is a local Olympia attorney and not only is he a great attorney but when I needed a lawyer that practiced different part of the law, terry gave me a great referral.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Brandon. It is important to us that we connect people with trusted lawyers in our community when a case falls outside our practice area.

reviews.text: Terry and his staff are super responsive and thoughtful. They stayed on top of my case the whole time and gave me great advice. Gave me lots of options and strategies. Very supportive and nice folks. Super professional and personable.   Got a great outcome rather than taking on the insurance company on my own.
reviews.ownerResponse: Adam, we appreciate your kind words. We are glad you felt it was a great outcome.

reviews.text: Bryan Johnson and his team did a great job handling all interactions with the insurance company, opposing council, mediation and legal filings which allowed my wife and me to focus on the extensive process of healing.  Regular updates on the case were provided so we never had to wonder where we were in the process.  We greatly appreciate the advice and guidance provided throughout the 3+ year process and we believe the outcome to be as positive as possible...  Thank you Bryan!
reviews.ownerResponse: Rick, we were happy to take on the insurance companies so you could heal. Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.text: Terry is amazing to talk to and work with.  He explains what is going on, what to expect and what needs to be done. His whole team is fantastic.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Mike.

reviews.text: Attorney Terry Church was excellent in his managing of our auto accident claim. When one is injured in an accident it can be overwhelming to deal with all the treatment that is needed to recover and also deal with the insurance companies. Terry's expertise made the process so much more manageable, and it was a relief to know that we had the best attorney helping us. Terry and his staff make sure his clients are well taken care of in all regards, and you truly feel supported. He has years of experience, and it showed when dealing with the insurance company and settlement. I have only the highest praise for this law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Tre, thank you for entrusting us with your case and calling out Terry’s expertise. We take pride in taking on the complex process of dealing with insurance companies so our clients can heal.

reviews.text:
Title: Exceptional Legal Support

I'm incredibly grateful for the amazing help I received from my attorney, Bryan Johnson, after my accidents. He and the office of Church, Rietzke, Johnson PLLC, were professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely caring every step of the way.

Bryan Johnson and the legal team handled my case with precision and dedication, making sure every detail was taken care of. He took the time to listen to my concerns, provided clear and concise explanations of the legal process, and consistently kept me informed and reassured throughout the entire journey.

His negotiation skills with the insurance companies were impressive, and secured an outcome that exceeded my expectations. The kindness and support I received during this difficult time was invaluable to me.

One of the most commendable aspects of working with Bryan was his unwavering commitment to my well-being. He not only served as a trusted legal advisor but also as a source of support and encouragement.

I highly recommend Bryan Johnson and his exceptional legal expertise and compassion. Thank you for everything!

Sincerely,
Brenda Chrisman
Terry and his team were great! Very professional and dedicated. They were straight forward and did a great job from start to finish,. Would recommend them to anyone.

I hired Bryon Johnson when I kept getting the run around from Farmers insurance company when their client rear ended me when I was stopped to make a left hand turn, with brake lights on and turn signal. I was injured and needed medical help. Bryon worked to get my car fixed and medical bills paid and kept me informed of updates as we went along. Although it took awhile to work through the insurance system Bryon Johnson negotiated a final satisfactory settlement with the insurance companies. I highly recomend him. Very pleasant to work with!!! Thank You Bryon Johnson!
Punctual, professional, friendly. My friend referred me and I couldn't have been more pleased. Bryan made it easy and stress-free!

Terry was very prompt with the process and all of my questions. He was always available when needed. From my understanding the process could take months or longer however Terry had this resolved in about 2 1/2 months. Very pleased with the outcome.
Bryan was very helpful and his knowledge was great in getting a great outcome.

I have nothing but good things to say about Terry and his team. He advocated for me and got me the settlement amount that I thought I deserved without litigation. Him and his team communicated promptly and were pleasant to work with. I highly recommend this firm for any personal injury or auto accident settlement needs!

I was traumatized and injured after my car accident in which a person decided texting was more important than driving. Getting barraged by insurance company calls while trying to heal was incredibly stressful - especially during the pandemic. That’s when I reached out to Terry Church. From Day 1, he and his team were amazing. They were responsive, personally accessible, experienced, knowledgeable, and skilled at negotiating. I appreciated their solid integrity and the fact that they are a local firm. I felt cared for throughout the process and trusted Terry and Joey explicitly. The end result was a more than fair settlement along with having all of my medical costs covered. I am super grateful I chose this firm and I highly recommend this team of legal experts.

I wasn't sure if I wanted to use an attorney. But Terry and his team created an outcome that was much better than I could have done on my own. Also, they were professional and supportive. I could focus on healing while they did the work. I would definitely recommend Church Rietzke Johnson.

Thank you Terry and Maurice. Your experience, perseverance, preparation, and good advice led to a positive outcome for my accident claim. You are both excellent communicators and helped me through a process that was very frustrating at times. Thanks also to Leslie and Joey for keeping things on track through the worst of COVID and beyond. A real team effort. I highly recommend Church Rietzke Johnson, PLLC.

I appreciate Bryan, Joey, and the entire team at Church Rietzke Johnson, PLLC.

I began collaborating with Bryan and Joey just prior to the pandemic. As with the rest of the world, we had to take an abrupt paused — stay home, stay safe. I had no expectations of what or when next steps would happen  to re-engage with my personal injury claim.

But Bryan and Joey never gave up. They contacted me as the pandemic began allowing us to return to business. Joey provided calm clear support. And Bryan gave me time and attention so that I understood all of my options to make informed decisions. I felt important, supported, and respected.

If you ever find yourself in need of legal support for a personal injury claim, I highly recommend the team at Church Rietzke Johnson,  PLLC.

I can't sing the praises of Terry and Joey loud enough. I was so stressed after my auto accident and had no idea how to deal with the insurance claims. Terry and Joey took all of the stress out of the situation for me and did a fantastic job representing my interests. I highly recommend this firm if you are in an auto accident.

Should you have the misfortune of a car accident, you will want to hire Church Rietzke Johnson.  I specifically worked with Bryan Johnson and team, and they are amazing.  Bryan and Joey are professional, friendly, capable, organized and easy to work with.  Bryan went above and beyond to push for a fair settlement package when the at-fault driver's insurance company was being unrealistic and completely unreasonable.  He explained the various options I could take along the way as they came up, and things to consider when choosing an option so that I went with the route I was most comfortable with.  I loved that they kept me in the loop throughout the process.  If you are debating whom you should call to take your case, I would say hire this firm, and ask for Bryan.  You will not regret it!

I contacted the office of Church Rietzke Johnson for assistance due to being involved in an accident and the insurance company was refusing to help me because they were claiming that they were not responsible.
I am extremely pleased with their Professional service.  They were very friendly, understanding and fought hard for me.
I was also pleased with their communication, I was never in the dark about what was going on with my case and that made me feel at ease.
Hopefully I don't need an attorney again, but if I do then I am contacting Terry Church and Joey first.

This is a five star review and public endorsement of how my personal accident case was transformed from total despair and frustration to a fully satisfactory settlement won by Personal Injury Attorney Bryan D. Johnson, a partner in the Church, Rietzke, Johnson law firm of Olympia, WA.  On December 8, 2017, another driver totaled my 2013 CTS Cadillac and severely injured my lower lumbar spine.  The other driver’s auto insurance company had to be practically arm wrestled to pay me near the actual replacement value of my luxury car as well as arbitrarily cut me off prematurely from paying for my reasonable and prescribed medical treatments.  Their unacceptable behavior forced me to search for the most highly qualified personal injury lawyer available, and fortunately I engaged Bryan Johnson to represent me and settle my case in my favor.  The initial settlement offers from the insurance lawyers were less than my past accumulated medical expenses, so we ended up suing the other driver for all of the uncompensated medical-related expenses as well as my pain and suffering resulting from the accident.  It took over a year to settle my case, but Bryan hung in there with me and we finally settled for an amount that we both considered a solid victory for both of us without the necessity of going through either arbitration or a civil trial.   Bryan did an outstanding job for me and he can also pull together one for you if you need a truly professional personal injury lawyer to secure the results you deserve.

Terry and team are the best. There’s no one more experienced working with insurance companies. He knows it all and will do the best possible work under the law. He and team are also friendly and will go the extra mile.
Professional, responsive, attentive, personable.  My experience was very satisfying.

I highly recommend Terry Church and his team at Church Rietzke Johnson. They helped me with my recent auto accident personal injury case. Terry & Joey made the process smooth and easy to understand, even during Covid. Hiring them put my mind at ease that my doctor bills would be covered without me fighting tooth and nail. I am also confident that I would never have been able to receive the settlement total that I was awarded if I had tried on my own. The whole group was kind, professional, and personable. Don’t hesitate to call Church Rietzke Johnson 🙂

Terry Church Review
I was at a complete stop in my car, rear-ended and injured. My insurance company stopped paying my medical bills shortly after treatment started. I was far from healed at that point and knew I had to continue my medical care. I needed a good lawyer to represent me. I knew of Terry Church's ethics and integrity in fighting for his clients. Terry fought my own insurance company through an arbitration process and got all of my medical bills paid.

But he didn't stop there. He then fought for recovery and won against the at-fault driver for pain and suffering so my medical treatments could continue as needed until my injuries stabilized. Because of his principles Terry goes the extra mile and does everything possible to resolve the claim in the best interest of his clients. It was a privilege to work with him and his paralegal Joey.

This is a 5-star review for Terry's professionalism, experience and commitment, his unwavering skill communicating with the insurance companies, and negotiating a settlement and last but not least - his incredible staff. I highly recommend Terry and the Church Rietzke Johnson law firm.

I was in an accident and was attempting to resolve the matter myself, however quickly realized I would be better off enlisting the help of a professional. Because of my job, I tend to work with many personal injury firms and have seen how awful some can be to work with - so I knew from the start that I did not want to use 90% of the larger firms that you see advertised. After doing some research on different smaller offices (that could offer a personal touch and not make you feel like a cog in an assembly line), I decided to reach out to Church, Rietzke, and Johnson. From the time of my first meeting with Mr. Church, and until the final disposition of my case, all of the staff there have been pleasant, informative, professional, and most importantly responsive. I frequently worked with Joey and he was incredibly patient and helpful. They were able to settle my case for much more than I ever anticipated and I know I would not have had the same results if I had anyone else handle my case. I hope I never need the same services in the future, but if I do, this is where I will go.

Terry Church is extremely competent, experienced, knowledgeable, a great listener,  has much wisdom, and advocates for his clients and their best interests. I highly recommend him as a personal injury attorney. He also has a superb team.

Church Rietzke Johnson helped me through my three year  car accident battle. There were different things that happen especially through the epidemic, however the Church Rietzke Johnson group was available and worked through it all. There were a few times my case manager changed but Mr. Johnson always was available no matter what. He returned my call very timely and was always willing and able to take the time to answer my many questions and in the end we got a lot more in the settlement than I personally was expecting. They were all very friendly and understanding. Mr. Johnson explained everything so that someone who doesn't fully understand legal terms understood what was going on and gave suggestion and never was pushy. The Church Rietzke Johnson group is someone Id suggest to though going through any legal struggles.

Reasoning for 4 starts is because I feel there is always room to grow and learn. I had a difficult time with my case manager changing but with everything going on it was understandable. I's give 4 and a half if I knew how to make the half star on this rating.

I was very pleased with Terry Church and his team! This is an amazing office, that care about their clients. I was rear ended and both of our vehicle's were totalled. Terry and his team were very patient with me and did not want to close the case unless I was at 100%. I would recommend my friends and family with Church Rietzke. Thank you again!

I was involved in a car accident that was not my fault as I was hit from behind.  There was not a lot of damage to my car but my body took the impact. I had to have physical therapy for a long time,  but it was worth it as I eventually was able to regain most of the mobility that I had lost. My attorney at Church Rietzke Johnson was extremely helpful.  He listened to my complaints about what had happened to me and was able to arrange a very good settlement for my case. My lawyer was available, worked hard for me and I was very happy with the results.

I had a great experience with Terry at Church Reitzke.  I was rear ended and the insurance company stopped paying my medical bills. I had no experience hiring a lawyer and was unsure how to proceed. Terry guided me through each step of the litigation process and successfully negotiated a settlement I am happy with.
Great hardworking people that fight for what's right!  Can't recommend them enough!
This a great place to hold American Auxiliary meetings.

My wife and I were rear-ended in a car wreck.  The opposing insurance company kept calling my wife and badgering her to sign some papers just a couple days after the wreck  The wreck was bad; we both had concussions; and we were in a really bad situation needing to heal up from this incident.

A good friend of ours recommended Terry and his firm.  We met with them and got a good feeling from the start.  He was able to immediately get the opposing insurance company to stop contacting my wife.  As time wore on, the other insurance company was very unresponsive and uncooperative.  After about a year went by, Terry started the process to go to court.  We were gearing up for depositions, interviews, the whole nine yards.  At that point, the opposing side finally capitulated and began to bargain with us. Everything eventually worked out in the end.

I am very grateful to Terry and his team for helping us out through the entire process.  He and his team were very patient and explained everything as we went along.  They were even able to occasionally meet after hours or on a weekend day when we could not get off from work.

I have worked with other attorneys in the past who were not as easy to work with, nor as professional.  I was very impressed with him and his team, that they were there for us, and worked so hard.

Terry and his paralegal Kristina were thorough, professional, and diligent about pursuing my car accident case. I felt confident about their experience and knowledge; they know how to strategize and see the case through. Although as you may imagine, I hope I never have a reason to work with them again, I highly recommend them to other individuals looking for a lawyer they can rely on.

Terry and his team worked with me on a personal injury claim related to an uninsured motorist accident. When I met with Terry the words that stuck with me were, “we’ll handle the insurance company and you focus on getting better.” That was the philosophy that carried through to a fair settlement.

He and his staff were great about explaining my options, timelines and possible outcomes. Communication was always timely and I knew what to expect and when to expect it. I’d never hired an attorney for a personal injury claim prior to this (and hope I don’t need to again!) but know that if I ever need one again I’d go to Terry and his team and I’d recommend them with full confidence to my friends or family needing help with a personal injury issue.
Great team to work with! Communicative and very respectful!

Terry Church represented me with a personal injury case approximately 12 years ago.  He and his staff helped me all along the way until he won my case for me.  He is an excellent attorney who is focused on your needs.  He is always there for you whenever you require him.  I couldn't give a higher recommendation than I do for Terry Church.

Shirley and Mike handled my recent auto claim involving myself and family. They were both so incredibly compassionate and easy to work with as well as supportive, timely and efficient. They worked diligently on our case and advocated for us every step along the way. While we focused on recovery, they handled all of the insurance and case headaches. I cannot recommend their services highly enough and while I hope we never have to use their services again, I will not hesitate to reach out if needed! Thank you Mike and Shirley ever so much for your energy and time supporting and advocating for us!

My experience with Mike and Shirley was outstanding. They were incredibly kind, knowledgeable, and supportive throughout the entire process. They made a stressful situation feel manageable and were always quick to respond to my questions or concerns. I truly felt taken care of every step of the way! I highly recommend them to anyone in need of representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so very much! We feel the same about you!

reviews.text:
I highly recommend Bluhm Morgan PLLC. I truly cannot say enough great things about Shirley and Mike. I lead an extremely busy work schedule, and they accommodated me every step of the way throughout the entire process, even from a distance, as I now live up north. Thanks to technology, we were able to work seamlessly together despite the distance, and the same has been true for others I’ve referred to their practice.

They recently helped me with my car accident case and made what could have been a very stressful situation feel organized, manageable, and smooth.

I have worked with Shirley multiple times over the past 15 years, and one of the qualities I appreciate most is her honesty. In my most recent case, I had the pleasure of working with Mike, and he has been a wonderful addition to Bluhm Morgan. Both Shirley and Mike are consistently upfront, clearly explain what to expect, outline what will be needed, and take a highly collaborative approach. I have never once felt belittled or dismissed. They genuinely care about their clients and their well-being, and it shows in the way they advocate and communicate.

They always act in my best interest, and that integrity is exactly why I have confidently referred friends and family to their practice over the years, all of whom have also had excellent experiences.

While I sincerely hope I never need their services again (because that would mean another accident!), if I do, they will absolutely be my first call, as they have been every time.

If you have been in an auto accident, I highly recommend seeking their counsel.  I also deeply appreciate that there is no retainer or upfront cost. They work on a contingency basis, meaning they are paid from your settlement, so you are not out of pocket during an already difficult time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Sarah, thank you for the kind and thoughtful review. We enjoyed representing you and wish you all the best!

reviews.text: I was referred to Shirley and Mike by a friend after my car accident. I had never been in a serious car accident and had no idea how to proceed. They took time to get to know me and my family and how the accident affected our lives. They let me know the process, and then did all the work themselves. So appreciative of their experience fighting for my family and getting a far larger settlement than expected. Great team that took time to go the extra mile for us.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind words. We enjoyed getting to know you and are so happy we can bring your case to a successful resolution. We are always here if you need us!

reviews.text: This team was an amazing support for my family after my car accident. I was a wreck and not sure how I was going to cover our needs after the accident even with having full coverage. Inwas referred by my massage therapist and could have been happier I made that call! This team made everything that seemed impossible to figure out, work out and took so much stress of my shoulders! I could not have been happier with the experience.
reviews.ownerResponse: Shaianna, thank you for the great review. We definitely consider ourselves a team, and we both enjoyed getting to know you. Thank you for trusting us, and please don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything.

reviews.text: They worked hard on our case.  You get to work with your attorney and not a paralegal on your case.  They do an excellent job keeping you informed about your case and it developments.   If I had another case I would not hesitate to pick up the phone and give them a call.  They listen and really care about you as a person and only want to seek the best for their clients!
reviews.ownerResponse: Tina, thank you for the kind review. It was a long journey but it's over and your patience more than paid off! Thank you for trusting us through the process. We wish you and Don all the best, and we are always here for you if you need us!

reviews.text: Shirley and Michael are amazing and help walk you through every step. I highly recommend them to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Charlene, thank you for the great review. We were so happy to help you! Have a wonderful holiday season!

reviews.text:
Thank you again Shirley and Mike. I know my case wasn’t really a big deal, but I appreciate your competence, and effort.  For me it was like the description of a good trip .  Getting to the destination without remembering the drive is what makes you appreciate the driver or drivers in this case.

Thanks again
Jim.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jim, I will have to borrow that from you. That's terrific. Thank you for the great review. And you are so welcome!

reviews.text: I’m so thankful I was referred to Bluhm Morgan PLLC. Both Shirley and Michael were so kind and pleasant to work with, they took care of everything and I got the best outcome I could have imagined. I was really shocked how quick they responded to me each time I reached out. I highly recommend Bluhm Morgan.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kelly, we are so happy for you. You deserve closure, and a very good end to your claim. Have a wonderful holiday season and thank you for the great review!

reviews.text: I worked with Shirley and Michael at Bluhm Morgan after my car accident in October 2024, and I couldn’t have asked for a better experience. They were both incredibly knowledgeable, compassionate, and clear in explaining every step of the process. I always felt informed and supported. They worked hard to achieve the best outcome for my case and were able to secure a settlement higher than I ever expected. I am truly grateful for their dedication and professionalism. If you ever find yourself needing a personal injury attorney, I highly recommend their team. Five stars all the way!
reviews.ownerResponse: Dolanna, we enjoyed working with you during every step of the process. You truly made this result a team effort. Thank you for the kind words. We are equally grateful to you!

reviews.text:
10 out of 10 recommend. Mike and Shirley run a small firm, but don’t let that fool you because their ability to manage the case and bring it to a close is fantastic. They really know how to effectively navigate the injury claim and insurance process and get to a resolution that will not leave their client disappointed.

My experience after being in a collision was nearly stress free and what stress I had is not a reflection on this legal team. Mike and Shirley are kind, respectful and NOT greedy money grabbers like some of the others out there. I highly recommend them to assist you with your situation, you won’t regret making that call or the decision to bring THEM on board.

You get both of them… a Team on your side. Enough said.
reviews.ownerResponse: Austin, thank you so much for the kind words. It means a lot to us. We were so happy to help you through the process. Thank you also for your service, and if you ever need anything, please don't hesitate to reach out!

reviews.text: Mike and Shirley are the dynamic duo that you need on your side, they worked together to get a resolution to my case that was very difficult. Mike is a very kind smart man with a great working knowledge of the law. Shirley has a combination of toughness paired with her knowledge of law that  make them a great team. Give them a call, they will help you. +
reviews.ownerResponse: T, thank you so much for the review. We feel like we are a great team, and it's so nice to hear from others that work with us. Thanks for being an amazing client. We wish you and your family well!

reviews.text: I highly recommend Shirley and Mike. They are so easy to work with, make things very simple and straight forward. I got in a car accident when I was pregnant and they were so helpful and kind. I ended up receiving much more money than I thought I would from my case. They made the process way less stressful for me. If you get in an accident please call them! They will help you.
reviews.ownerResponse: Hannah, thank you so much, we feel the same about you! You deserved this resolution, and we were so happy to help you!

reviews.text: I want to tell everyone about the incredible experience that I had after my automobile accident.  The person that hit me from behind provided a bogus insurance card to the police officer that arrived on the seen. I didn't know that as I immediately went to the ER. Mike was able to track down the person and get his real insurance information.  Once I was done at the ER I felt extremely frustrated after I took one look at my vehicle.  I didn't know where to start. My wife recommended that I reach out to Mike and Shirley for assistance.  It was the best recommendation I was ever given. Mike immidetely set me up with a great chiropractor and a great body shop to get my car fixed.  I felt like I was never alone after that.  His office was always professional and always called me back with any questions that I may have had. I was able to get healed and my car was fixed quick and the best part was how hard he worked on getting me a great settlement.  I would recommend Mike and Shirley to anyone that may have been in an accident.  The experience was amazing and I can't say enough.  If you or your family members need a great attorney please reach out to this office.  You will be so happy with the service and make a lifetime friend as well.  Thank you again Mike and Shirley!
reviews.ownerResponse: Yvonne, your review means a lot. We are so happy we could help you through a difficult time. Thanks for being such a great client and person!

reviews.text: Mike and Shirley were wonderful throughout the process of settling with insurance after a vehicle accident my daughter and I were in that resulted in medical care and missed workdays / school days / important events.They were kind and considerate during a really difficult time when I was struggling to find my footing dealing with the repercussions of the incident. They consistently advocated in our best interest, answered many questions, and provided clarification when needed. They are professional & persistent when necessary, always easy to work with. Knowing we were in their good hands relieved much of the stress of the whole ordeal. Now that we are back to enjoying the activities we did prior to the accident (like paddle boarding!), I can’t imagine how we could have managed the ordeal without them and can’t recommend them highly enough. Thank you Bluhm Morgan PLLC!
reviews.ownerResponse: Andrea, that's a lovely picture and thank you for the great review!

reviews.text: Over two years ago, my daughter and I were T-boned by an uninsured driver. She suffered a traumatic brain injury, and our lives changed forever. Mike and Shirley fought hard with our insurance company to get us the highest settlement possible. They truly put their clients first, and their compassion and dedication meant the world to us. So thankful we were referred to them!
reviews.ownerResponse: Amy, thank you so much for this thoughtful review. It was a difficult journey and we are so happy we could help you and your amazing daughter through it!

reviews.text: After my car accident, Mike Morgan was awesome in telling me what my options were--what I could realistically do. He is very nice and very understanding. I would go back to him in a heart beat.
reviews.ownerResponse: Judi, Thank you for the kind words. I wish you all the best!

reviews.text: Just concluded working with Shirley and Mike at Bluhm Morgan, PLLC, after a recent car crash. They were both fantastic, and I would recommend them to anyone needing help after being injured by another party. They helped with every stage of the process, from explaining everything to getting the insurance companies to pay what they owed. My suggestion: don't take on the insurance companies by yourself. After all, they have lawyers, so why wouldn't you?
reviews.ownerResponse: Jeff, thank you for taking time to leave us a review, and to share your experience. We agree with you. We hope people consider our firm when needing representation, but regardless, people should definitely have someone in their corner. Thanks again, Jeff.

reviews.text:
From the beginning, the attorneys were professional and on point.  We never worried about their actions or progress.  They kept us updated and and encouraged about the outcome. I know there was a great deal of research and documentation going on all along, far above our knowledge or abilities.
They have earned our total loyalty.
We would not hesitate a second to turn to them in another crisis (God forbid).  Del and Linda Bradford
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much, Linda! That means a great deal to us. We hope you will never need us again, but please don't ever hesitate to reach out, even to say hi!

reviews.text: I was in an accident that was not my fault and had significant damage to my car. I also sustained injuries that required care like massage, chiropractic work, acupuncture, etc and I quickly went through my PIP money. They helped me get my bills paid for and made the entire process easy for me during a very stressful time. They kept me informed throughout the entire process and were honest and compassionate to my situation. Would highly recommend them to anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jeanine, thank you for sharing your experience. It was a challenging time, but you did so well in getting through it. We are so glad we were able to help you. Thank you for trusting us, and for being such a great client and person!

reviews.text: Mike and Shirley are amazing. They worked behind the scenes, while being always reachable, to get me through my car accident and getting me the settlement that I deserved. Definitely recommend them to anyone looking for a personal injury attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Rosalene, thank you so much for the review. We enjoyed representing you, and we are so happy your claim resolved, and you have closure. We hope to not see you in our office again, but we are excited to come see you at your new thrift store, Ax & Room Oddities!! Congratulations!

reviews.text: Worked very diligently on my case. Went above and beyond at the end even when insurance was not willing to bend. Will be utilizing again.

Shirley and Mike are the best. Their expertise in dealing with insurance companies (including my own) is such a stress reliever. They do this every day for their clients and it shows. So grateful I could turn the whole thing over to them and know my trust was well placed, while I focused on my health, my family and my business. They know what they're doing and delivered much better results than I could have gotten on my own. Thanks for the peace of mind, Mike and Shirley!
reviews.ownerResponse: Hey Mark,  you are so welcome, and thank you for the awesome review. It really makes our day to know that you were happy with the experience. It can be stressful, but we do our best to take as much off of you and our clients as we can. Thanks for being a great client! We appreciate you. Have a great summer and good luck on the STP!

reviews.text: I was in a car accident, which was no fault of my own yet resulted in a neck injury, and significant damage to my vehicle. Both Shirley and Mike were friendly, professional, and efficient. Both were extremely clear through the process and were readily available when I did have questions. When the process was over, I was happily surprised at the settlement. I really appreciated how direct  they were. I was never in the dark. I would highly recommend them in the future and I would also use them again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Jesse, thank you so much for the kind words. We enjoyed working with you, and are happy to know you felt the same. Best wishes, and we are here if you need us!

reviews.text:
I wanted to say how thankful I am for this firm, and how wonderful Mike was to work with! My husband and child were in a bad car accident and the insurance company was trying to take advantage of us and give us nothing for our medical bills and injuries! Mike got us the settlement we deserved while keeping our best interests his number one priority! I couldn’t have asked for a better outcome from such a difficult process!

reviews.text:
Edit after owners reply: I never got a private apology, this is the first apology ever. The only contact we’ve had since the last email stating “sorry for your inconvenience” has been me sending MULTIPLE emails telling you to remove me from your mailing list. But thanks for the public apology to make it look professional.  And you’re welcome for my settlement money.

Let me start off by saying, the ONLY reason I got an attorney, was because my chiropractor’s office required an attorney for motor vehicle accident claims.
At my first consult with Peter, I seemed very confident it was going to be helpful to have him and his team on my side. Boy was I wrong.. I literally did everything the entire process. I was told having a lawyer would make things easier and I wouldn’t have to do much work- WRONG. I had to hassle USAA MYSELF to get them to redo my car valuation THREE TIMES because they kept messing it up. Peter assured me he would be able to help get my car back quickly, but my car sat at a shop and then got towed to a junk yard without my knowledge or consent, so Peter’s team thought it was a total loss and told me to tell them everything I had in my car so we could get reimbursed for it all. I literally just wanted my car to be fixed and be back to me. Peter said this would be the easier part, wouldn’t take long at all to handle, and the medical stuff would take the longest- which it did. But getting my car back took about 5 months. I was without a vehicle for 5 months. I was in contact with one paralegal on Peter’s team who didn’t seem interested in helping me, and then he dropped off the face of the earth and I was working with another one, but then I believe even a third paralegal ended up taking over without anyone telling me anyone was switching. I’ve been confused and frustrated basically this entire process. I kept getting told I’d hear back from his group, and then I wouldn’t hear from them for weeks, even months, I’d have to email multiple times to get an actual response from anyone to answer any of my questions. It’s been a battle. I feel like I’ve battled the insurance company as well as his attorneys office- I’ve put in so much time and effort, all that was promised I wouldn’t have to put in, but I did. If you don’t hear anything from the insurance company, communicate that to your clients!!! Don’t just leave them on read and ghost them!! Unacceptable! And if you switch paralegals on someone, let them know! I was so confused getting emails from names I didn’t recognize and having them act like we’ve spoken before, but never once got introduced to any new person on my case. This whole process has been a shitshow in my opinion and next time I get in a wreck, I’m not getting an attorney- clearly I can do everything they do, but get it done in a more timely manner, I proved that this entire process.
And when I brought this up to Peter towards the end of working with them, he told me “sorry for your inconvenience” but not once did he say they’d do anything to make it better or an easier process. Once I got my check sent for someone else outside his team, I’ve never heard from him again, not even to say thank you for being a client and getting him and his business money from my insurance claim.
reviews.ownerResponse: Kaydon, I know we've talked since, but we want to publicly say we are sorry that you had this experience, and thank you for the opportunity to allow us to review our systems and procedures on some things.

I recently hired Peter Kesling of Capital Injury Law to handle my insurance claim, and I am extremely satisfied with the results. Kesling was able to successfully negotiate with the insurance company and secure a significantly higher payout for my claim.

The initial offer from the insurance company was only $13,000, which I found to be grossly inadequate.  My husband and initially tried to negotiate on our own but the insurance company was unyielding. We hired Peter Kesling and with his expertise and dedication, they were able to obtain a substantial increase in the payout to $20,000. I was thrilled with the outcome, and it made a significant difference in my financial recovery from the damages.

Throughout the entire process, Kesling demonstrated exceptional professionalism, responsiveness, and knowledge of insurance law. He was also assertive in negotiating with the insurance company to ensure I received fair compensation for my claim.

I was impressed with Kesling's attention to detail and the thoroughness of their work. They navigated the complex legal process with skill and efficiency, and their expertise in dealing with insurance companies was evident. Peter was also compassionate and understanding, showing genuine care for my situation and providing support throughout the process.

I highly recommend Peter Kesing for anyone in need of legal representation for an insurance claim or personal injury  They exceeded my expectations and achieved a remarkable outcome, significantly increasing my payout from $13,000 to $20,000. I am grateful for their outstanding service and dedication to my case. Thank you, Peter, for your exceptional work!

reviews.text:
I seldom write reviews, but in this case I feel the need to put in a good word.

This spring, my 16 year old son received two speeding tickets.  Nothing reckless, just inattentiveness and inexperience.  Unfortunately, with an intermediate driver's license, this means an automatic six month suspension of his driving privileges.  Ordinarily, this would be no more than an inconvenience, and probably a good lesson.  Unfortunately, in my son's case the consequence of a license suspension would have had a very severe impact on his future.  He was scheduled to begin Junior College in September, and we live in a very rural area, with no public transportation.  Loss of his license would have made it impossible to attend classes, either at Junior College, or at his regular High School.  My son is a very conscientious "A" student, and the prospect of his being unable to attend school threw the whole family into a panic.

An online search brought me to the office of Attorney Jason Newcombe.  From my first call to his office, we were made to feel that we were in competent hands.  Every e-mail and call we made was handled promptly and professionally, and we were always made to feel that we were working with someone who really cared about us.
Attorney Newcombe was able to arrange for my son's citation to be deferred upon completion of an on-line driving course.  Needless to say, he has earned great gratitude and respect from our family.  I cannot recommend him highly enough.

Although being represented by Atty. Newcomb has been a pleasure, I'm hoping I won't be needing his services again.  But, with three sons aged 16, 18 and 19, I think I'll keep his number handy, just in case...
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text:
First I will state the good, Melissa spoke very professionally to me and was very nice. She listened intently to my concerns and made me feel very heard. I paid Melissa 410$ for a one hour consult. I was told they would not take a contested case. I let Melissa know that my case though the other party may not be happy, would not be legally contested. I was feeling very hopeful about my case being taken on by this firm due to how thorough and understanding she was during my consult. After my consult I emailed asking what the next steps moving forward would be only to be told there was a large amount of cases on their workload and to contact back after the first week of October. I contacted back hoping to schedule the sometime the second week of October only to be told we cannot take your case and to look elsewhere. In the meantime I have been waiting while my case has continued to get worse hoping for this so go through as I am a single mother and the 410$ was not easy to just part with for a consultation. My honest opinion is though Melissa may in fact be a fantastic lawyer for the cases she chooses to take on, it was not professional or appropriate to to charge 410$ for an hour consult if she in fact knew she could not take my case at this time, this felt like a ploy to take my money and has left my pocketbook hurting while still searching for legal representation. By the time I pay another firm for a consultation I could be out another 200-400$ and still possibly not have someone willing to take this case at the end of the day. Charging for a consult when you know you cannot take a clients case is a very bad look for any reputable law firm or otherwise.
Please be weary of the types of questions  you ask about what a consult entails and what next steps would be before forking our hundreds in this economy.

I highly recommend Melissa Denton at Ascher & Denton Family Law. While I reflect on the last year, with the changes, challenges, and court battles, I hope that Melissa Denton knows the monumental impact she and her staff made on my family’s lives. Our current reality would look very different right now without her support and guidance. I cannot say enough how grateful I am for her and her team, who were all professional, knowledgeable, responsive, and best of all, personable. They have worked tirelessly with me to fight for the best interests of my family! If you are unsure who to call for matters of family law, call Ascher & Denton; you will not regret it!
