SHE TURNED IN DOCUMENTS EVEN A DAY BEFORE ( WHICH THEY DONT CONSIDER BECAUSE ITS TOO LATE FOR THE COURT TO REVIEW )  & THE JUDGE WAS APPALLED. HIGHLY UPSET AND DISAPPOINTED! WASTE OF MY MONEY & TIME! I SWEAR SHE DIDNT EVEN REVIEW MY CASE !!!

I had the pleasure to work with Melissa and her staff on a last minute custody case.  We had very little time to prepare!  I am so thankful that Melissa was my first call.  After just a few minutes on the phone, I knew we had made the right choice!  We are located in California and had no knowledge of attorneys in the area, it was a huge relief knowing we had found the right attorney!   The time she took to get to know us, as well as, the other party involved, really warmed our heart.  She truly cares about people!  Fast forward a couple of weeks and Melissa was able to resolve the matter without further court hearings.  We are so lucky and blessed to have worked with Melissa and her entire team, every bit of the process was flawless!  Her team is extremely friendly and knowledgeable.  I highly recommend her services, it is by far one of the best experiences we have had.  Thank you Melissa and team at Ascher and Denton!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Jennifer! We are so very glad that things worked out for the best here in Washington. My best wishes to you and the family in California.

reviews.text: Melissa intervened with amazing promptness, knowledge, wisdom and compassion to help all parties see what was best for the child, and each other. She has counseling skills so your getting double service from one person. Thank you so very much from the bottom of my heart. You helped everyone.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much Diane. I am honored and grateful for your review. Like in the last few reviews, I don't recognize your name but I am glad I helped your family. You are welcome.

reviews.text: When it came time to look for a Family Law Attorney, Ascher and Denton was referred to me by a "friend of a friend". I met Ingrid Zerpa who immediately made me feel comfortable with the process I was about to embark on. Ingrid was very professional, yet caring about my situation and remained patient throughout the entire process, which took over a year to complete. I would definitely recommend Ingrid and her staff to anyone in need with professional Family Law situations in the future. Thank You Ingrid and Ascher& Denton for your services.
I would highly recommend Ingrid at Ascher and Denton. She will work tirelessly for you. I found her to be caring, compassionate, and professional the entire time we worked together.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Shelley. We are honored that you entrusted us with your important business.

reviews.text: After interviewing several family law attorneys I was delighted to meet Melissa. Right away I felt like I could place myself and my needs in her very experienced, capable hands. She was strong and solid as a rock while I was in my weakest emotional state. Her ability to take command and do what is necessary was such a relief to me. As a result we got a ruling that I believe is fair, and am very happy with. I'm also very happy with her pricing structure. I feel its the best money I've spent in a very long time. I've continued to retain Melissa as my family law attorney and call on her frequently to help me with details in the aftermath of my divorce. I recommend Melissa highly. I want to also put in a mention for Kaylene. She is absolutely amazing. Her expertise, attention to detail and "bedside manner" are phenomenal. Thank you both for everything you've done and continue to do on my behalf. -Carl
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much Carl. We are grateful that we could help you.

reviews.text: Horrible communication! I do not recommend!
I've known Melissa Denton for almost 25 years.  She is a highly effective attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Sans. It is a pleasure to work with you in our wonderful legal community.

reviews.text: I had a very tough and emotionally draining case that in the beginning looked like it should be simple. When I met Melissa Denton I was immediately impressed with her ability to be pragmatic and compassionate all in the same moment. At all times during this process she was professional and did a perfect job at making sure I understood my options for each moment I had to go through. I also had a huge amount of time spent with her staff......Kaylene and Dani......and again I was nothing but impressed with their ability to handle everything with grace, alacrity and sincerity.  In addition, since this is a huge financial consideration, I was always charged in a more than fair manner and I left the entire experience feeling like these women were my guides through one of the most emotionally trying times in my life. My sincerest thanks to all of you for your efforts and for helping me to move forward with my life feeling like I was part of a something way more special than just a business transaction.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jennifer. You have a special place in our hearts, too. We truly care about our clients and are very grateful for your kind words.  - Melissa

reviews.text:
We were told that we could not appeal, not that we couldn't win the appeal. Found out that the information is wrong and we suffered.

For the owner to suggest that I am wrong and that they know something others don't is foolish. I am a respected member of the community with no record of any kind. I advocate for children daily.

You guys have my check with all my information on it, if you'd like to make it up, feel free to contact me. I balk when a family and child is hurt from legal ineptness of which I see way too often with in the state organizations already. I was hoping that paying for legal advice and seeing all the great reviews would help, it didn't. Just money flushed down the toilet. And now attorney wanting to pass blame to the client without any knowledge. Shows very little character.

Yes, I am also D Wilson. I can't seem to edit my other review, so I am doing this one.  So many of the good reviews are from people out of state. Weird. Also, don't forget to look at Yelp.

If you have a  bad experience with an attorney, dr, dentist, whatever, it is so important to share the information. Too much is hidden from regular people and reviews can be faked and skewed, especially positive ones. Also, beware of company owners who try to lay the blame at the reviewers feet without proof.

Stay far away from this place. I took my young friend there for legal advice. She said that the judgement couldn't be appealed. Today we went to get free legal aid and found out Zerpa was dead wrong. I only took him there because of the high ratings. Don't trust those rating. I paid her consultation fee thinking that she wouldn't be a hack. So disappointed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ingrid is out of our office right now due to preparations for her wedding. As senior lawyer here and as her mentor, I respect that another lawyer at free legal aid may have told this person's friend something different than what Ingrid said. I don't know exactly what was said at either interview, but lawyers can differ in their opinions on legal matters and whether an appeal is possible or whether it would be successful is something that no one knows right now, because no court has ruled on it. I'm sorry that this friend of someone who consulted with Ingrid felt it important to tell the world to "Stay far away from this place". I don't think you should take that person's advice, from what I know.

reviews.text: I would recommend this company to anybody that needs a great family attorney. Thank you Melissa and Ingrid for your help! Amazing job!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks so much Raymond. We are really glad that you were satisfied with our services. Best wishes to you and your family.

reviews.text: Ingrid did a fantastic job of managing my divorce.  Divorce is complicated and emotional and Ingrid guided me every step of the way.  She was supportive, very helpful in working with the other side,  yet definately my advocate. I highly recommend  her.

Very unhappy with service and lack of progress! Have paid  a lot of money to get nowhere. Started working with them in January. Six months have passed and we are more stressed out about child support and parenting plan now. They are passive unmotivated and unsympathetic! Do not hire them!

Melissa represented me through my divorce. Her compassionate, sound advice was above and beyond what I expected from a divorce lawyer. Her professionalism stood out among others I looked at to handle my case.  In the end I was extremely pleased with the results.  Melissa's made me feel confident and sure things would be ok. I'm very grateful for her expertise and guidance through the entire process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Oh, thank you so much Stephanie. We are grateful that you put your trust in us and very glad we lived up to your expectations. - Melissa

reviews.text:
I just wanted to take a moment to let you know of my experience with Attorney, Melissa Denton and Law Clerk, Kaylene Petitt. Far too often, people are eager to write letters or make a phone call to complain, but I wanted to take the time to write to say that I am very pleased with their performance, support, professionalism and determination. Throughout my case, they were always very quick to respond, available, and always patient in explaining the status and details/developments of my case. Communication was excellent. Melissa took great care to listen to my concerns before, during, and after my case. Melissa also gave me the courage to do what is in the best interest and safety for me and my children.

Both Melissa and Kaylene did everything in their power to ensure this process had truly been as smooth and comfortable as possible. Every step along the way, I was kept informed of the progress, promises were maintained, and copies of communication between my lawyer and the defendant’s representatives were always sent to me. I could not have asked for more! I thank and commend Melissa Denton and Kaylene Petitt for providing highly professional and caring service throughout this process. I highly recommend Ascher and Denton Family Law. They have gone above and beyond what I expected of a law office to ensure that my family was taken care of and I am happy with the results of my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for such a lovely and warm review. We do try hard to provide great service and to make the whole process of a family law case less painful for everyone involved.

reviews.text: Melissa Denton is an incredible, compassionate lawyer with a wealth of knowledge in Family Law.  She takes a personable and caring approach when working with her clients.   Melissa made me feel at ease and confident that my case would be settled impartially and just.  During the legal process, she ensured that I remained stress free, managing every detail of my case.  I hired Melissa six years ago and when I was faced with another legal encounter, I didn't hesitate to call her again. She is truly an effective and efficient lawyer that is passionate about the law and her clients.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you very much! Working to be worthy of your trust means the world to us.

reviews.text: Melissa Denton made my divorce as quick and painless as possible.  She was an amazing advocate for my children.  This woman is fierce, smart, and fair.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much! I am so glad we were able to help you. Take good care. - Melissa

reviews.text: Matthew was recommended by a family friend. Matthew and his assistant Martin care about you as a person, not just a case. I highly recommend working with this group for personal injury cases. I gained two friends through this process, and could not be happier with the outcome. If your not convinced by mine or other reviews to hire this group, then I encourage you just to call and get a consultation.
I am very satisfied with their help. I practically didn’t do anything they did it all for me. 100% recommended.
I had no idea what I was doing after I got hit while pregnant. He helped me every step of the way even with the little things. He's amazing and great at communicating.

MVG Law helped me get my personal injury case close in time frame that I thought was gonna take much much longer. But not only are they knowledgeable but answered all kind of questions regarding my personal injury case.

Although I'd like to say hopefully it doesn't happen again, but I would 100% reach out once more if I'm ever Injured in a car accident or something similar.

Absolutely Fantastic, Thank You so Much💜.
Matt is personable, professional and extremely helpful in dealing with legal matters. His assistant Martin is excellent as well. I highly recommend them for your legal needs.
Matthew and his team did great work and represented me very well.  I would recommend him and use his expertise again.
He's excellent, you can't ask for no better
If you want honesty and respect you can trust this firm they know what they doing

Initially, Insurance offered $300 to settle. I’m glad I decided to consult with Matt, he was very helpful and supportive throughout my treatment and legal process. He made sure I got a great compensation.

MVG Law is a quality personal injury attorney group.  I was injured in a car accident and Matthew Van Gieson got me a fair settlement.  He was courteous, professional and direct in representing my interests while assisting me in putting the pieces together.  I highly recommend Matthew Van Gieson and MVG Law here in Olympia, WA
A car accident is never a fun thing to go through, but through everything they made me feel so comfortable and confident! They made the whole situation so easy for me and I’m so grateful!

I can very highly recommend Mr. Matthew Van Gieson at MVG Law- Five stars plus.

Reasons to hire MVG Law include his:
-  Genuine care and compassion.
-  Honesty, trustworthiness.
-  Desire to serve + work hard and smart.
-  Direct, straightforward communication.
-  *Acute and comprehensive understanding of scope of law practiced.

Matt put me at ease during a long difficult time and gave me strength and peace. The resolution of my case was welcome and made me so grateful to have Matt on my side.
Punctual, smart, understanding, thorough, & kind, took care of business

As a general rule we are not litigious people, but I was involved in a serious accident and I knew we were going to need help. A friend of ours (who is also a lawyer) recommended Matt.
Matthew and Martin took care of everything, I can’t imagine what this situation would have looked like without their help. They dealt with medical bills and insurance companies which allowed me and my family to focus on getting back to normal.
Honestly, if you’re in a situation where you may need a lawyer these are genuinely good dudes and if you’re wondering about the settlement, they exceeded our expectations in that regard.
I would recommend Matthew to anyone who’s experienced an injury.  He’s a professional who spends time getting the facts as well as understanding the impact to the individual.

A few years back we needed a lawyer, so I contacted a well known lawyer in Tacoma but he was not able to accept new clients, but recommended a lawyer in Olympia named Matthew Van Gieson at MVG Law, and I am so glad we had Matthew represent us on our case. He was compassionate, understanding, caring of our situation. He handled our case from day one till the resolution with great attention to to us and our case My wife and I without reservation recommend Matthew Van Gieson if you need a lawyer who take will take good care of you.
Helped me receive a lot more payback for an accident that cause me a lot of issues than I expected helped answer every question I had na over all very helpful

I really really did not want to hire an attorney, but I had no choice. I could not afford all the medical bills. I got really lucky when I found Matt. He was so great. He made the whole process easy. He was always there when I had a question and explained it so I could understand what to expect. Thanks you so much Matt.  I really appreciate all your hard work.

Matt was easy to talk with and share the effect of the car accident. He is knowledgeable, positive, dependable, responsive and answered all of my questions. I was very pleased with the settlement he negotiated on my behalf. Great Attorney!

Matthew is a very professional and knowledgeable lawyer. He has been very reliable and had always provided prompt response and assistance at times of needs. It has been such a relief knowing that we can always count on Matthew at the difficult times. He is our life saver and stress reducer! I highly recommend him to represent you!

When my son was in a horrible car accident and received what we knew would be long term injuries that would alter his day to day for life, I asked around to friends old and new and received Matt's name.  We interviewed him and several other attorney's in our area and Matt was our choice.  While our process was long, Matt left no stone unturned when attempting to recover settlement options for our son.  We went into it believing that we didn't have much to work with and came out with payment for his medical expenses now and a sizable settlement that we were happy with for my son for his future.  Matt is professional, knowledgeable and very responsive and we definitely recommend his services to others.

Matt's definitely a top notch guy and there to help you. My family led me onto him after a bad car accident. He was there to make sure I had the help I needed and was taken care of with little health insurance, and not much to go on. Lots of shady law firms out there and Matthew is the upmost professional, follows through, and sticks to what he says. Number one professional in his expertise in my opinion.
Mat was super easy to communicate with and really cared about getting me the best settlement! Highly recommend!!
100% recommended !!! They are very good doing their job, they’re very kind & helpful.
Matt is very smart, empathetic and exactly as aggressive as he needs to be. We could not have found a better attorney to represent us.

I was involved in an auto accident the other driver was distracted and attempted to blame us for the accident when the at fault driver crossed center line and hit us head on. We went with this law firm second because the other firm was inattentive.  Wish we would have started with them first. The matter was settled quickly and with the other driver being out of state added complications, you would not know because everything went smoothly from my end.  This law firm also had a pleasant surprise and offered an opportunity for me to help in my community in a way I would not normally have been able to.  They are a business that I am privileged to support and they make our community a better place to live and work.    I referred a close friend to this law firm before my matter was settled and they where also very satisfied with the professionalism and attentiveness allowing for the matter to be resolved quickly and above and beyond all expectations.  This law firm takes care of you like a close personal family member.

Matt was so helpful in everything. He went beyond everything. All that I went through, having 2 accidents, he was there to give advanced advice on everything. His knowledge was outstanding. If something ever happens again, Matt would be the first I would call. I whole heartedly recommend MVG-LAW. Thank you again Matt.
Signed, Margaret Kime.

Matt Van Gieson is AMAZING!  He is very down to earth, honest and hard working.  He always returned my calls promptly, was very respectful, courteous and accommodating.  He did exactly what he said that he would do and I wound up settling fairly with little effort from my side.  I would recommend him to everyone!!!!!!!!!!

Such a very cool lawyer to work with, unlike a lot of lawyers that are very hard to get in touch with; he is always available to answer all of your questions or concerns. Would recommend!! Thank you so much.

Matt was always open and honest with communications with me. I feel he was open to hear my concerns and addressed each one. He works hard for his clients and helps you feel comfortable throughout the process. I would recommend Matt to anyone dealing with injuries from a car accident.

Matt is friendly and was informative about the whole process through my case. He responded quickly to any emails and messages that I sent him. And, was able to settle my case for nearly double what I asked.

Matt is experienced, call him if you need an Attorney. I had a very good experience using him to help me receive compensation for my injuries from my accident. He's a great guy to work with, very helpful, answers your questions and even answers what you don't know to ask! You don't need an Attorney often but when you need one, he's the best.

Best lawyer I could ever hope for.

Matt is an extremely passionate and intelligent individual who actually cares about his clients, I cannot express enough how impressed I was.

He changed my life.

Matthew REALLY impressed me by fighting hard for what my case deserved. My case was frustrating and drawn out due to the other party and Matthew made sure I had no stress from this. He took care of everything and was available literally 24/7 to answer my questions. He was so organized and explained everything so that someone like me that isnt versed in law could understand. I felt like he TRULY cared what the outcome for me was and was not just after a quick buck like many lawyers. He was able to have us settle for more than what they continuously were trying to make us take. He didnt give up and knew it was worth more. I wish I could give 10 stars. Im beyond happy with the outcome. My injuries are lifelong and he made me feel that I wouldnt just be brushed under the rug like the opposing insurance company wanted.
Had a great and very easy experience with Matt would 100% recommend him to anyone looking to get a case settled!

We would like to thank Matthew Van Gieson. We had a hard personal injury case due to a car accident where both my wife and I were injured he fought tooth and nail all the way to the end. He was a very respectful guy and got us more money in our settlements then we could have imaged. We would recommend him to any of our friends and family.
Matt is a great guy who will use all the tools available to him to help you. He is easy to talk to and cares about his clients. Happy to have been recommended to him..

Mr. Van Giesen was fabulous as an attorney! More importantly, I feel like his attention to personal detail and even comradery was first class. I'd have to say that he is not just an attorney...He's that 'Guardian Angel' that you need, when your life gets turned upside down in an accidental sort of way.

AMAZING! That is the one word that we would describe our outstanding experience with hiring Mr. Van Gieson.  He was very attentive to our needs and listened to all that had transpired which led us to needing to hire a lawyer.  He took our case when no one else would because he believed in us and our situation.  He fought and WON our case! Mr. Van Gieson kept us very involved in every step of the way and communication was top-notch.  Not once did we fear we were on our own during this entire issue. We recommend him to everyone who asks us if we know a lawyer and he is most certainly on our speed-dial should we ever need another lawyer.

Highly recommend Matthew, I don’t think that words can express how wonderful my experience has been. Such a positive experience that I went to him, again, after my second car accident. Finishing up my first case and started working on my second. Not one time did I ever feel confused , overwelmed or frustrated with the process. His communication skills are superb, he’s personable, professional and he is beyond kind and honest, can’t thank him enough for his excellent work.

My journey with Matt started over a year ago when I was rear-ended at a stop light and received a whiplash.  I was able to receive the treatment that I needed to get better thanks to Matt!  He was always professional, courteous and empathetic.  He responded to all my inquires in a timely fashion and when it came to time to settle with the insurance company he made sure that I understood the process.  I never felt left in the dark or confused about anything thanks to Matt!  He is a real pro and I would highly recommend him to anyone that needs a great injury attorney...my settlement was fair and my medical bills will be paid.  Matt has been such a blessing he helped me heal and get back on my feet!  Thank you soooo much Matt and God Bless what you do it is so important helping people you are the real deal :-)

He helped me get everything I wanted from my claim-- and more!  He makes you feel like a person, and not just a dollar sign.  He is very good about keeping close contact and answering questions.  I would hire him again in an instant.  He is NOT one of those stereotypical "greedy" lawyers!  You can tell that he cares about you, and your case.  He will go above and beyond to help you with what you are needing.  I would refer any of my friends and family to hire him if they found themselves in a situation like I was!  He is also very helpful in the way that if you need additional services, he will make referrals for you.
Has been very helpful. Communicates well. Explains things in a way that is easy to understand.

I would highly recommend Matt! I can be high maintenance at times and Matt was completely understanding, sympathetic, and personable with me the entire time. And to top it all off I received more on my claim than what I had anticipated. I would only recommend Matt as an attorney. No one else! Thanks again, Matt! You are greatly appreciated!
Matt did a great job.  Helped me get the medical care I needed and helped me have the best possible outcome.

Matt was the best! Not only did I feel taken care of but he was sympathetic to what I was going thru after a car accident. He took time to make sure I understood my options and to answer any questions I had. He kept me informed and treated me and my situation with respect and professionalism. He was warm and comforting and I felt confident the entire time in his abilities. Hands down the best experience I've ever had with a lawyer. Highly recommend!

Matt gets the job done, he looks out for clients, communication is always there, he's efficient and gets the results you deserve after having to deal with life altering stressful situations. I would refer any friends or family to him.

I recently got hit by a car on my motorcycle and Matthew from MVG Law took my case. I was able to get to the chiropractor and hospital, and I didn't have to do anything really. I was expecting maybe 3 thousand dollars settlement, but he got me 2500 for repairs, and also I ended up with 11,000 dollars in my pocket, after paying him and medical, amazing!

I have nothing but good things to say, very knowledgeable, professional, has integrity, helpful, and most of all does what he can to make your situation right. I’m extremely happy with his services, and will be the only attorney I will use…
He was so helpful to me. He gave me great advice and I felt he is very empathic to my situation. I really appreciate his time and attention.

Ryan Bedford's law office provided me with excellent advice and guidance. I found Mr. Ryan Bedford to be professional, knowledgeable and highly effective in his legal services. I strongly recommend his name for anyone in need of a good lawyer.
Ryan was very helpful, friendly, and professional!

Ryan was the only attorney who listened enough to actually help me define what I needed to do.  Other attorneys I sought out didn’t listen and just dismissed my situation as too niche, and to go to the Bar Association for a referral (which they don’t do, by the way).  Not only was he efficient and effective, he was soooooo incredibly kind and educational.  Please go to him if you are the curious type and want to understand legal matters because he’s got a knack for clarity and extremely patient and sensitive, too.  He made me feel supported and empowered.  Thank you so much, Ryan!!!

Ryan Bedford has been working with me to close my late father's estate and settle out with my brothers. My schedule is chaotic and Ryan has been patient and worked with me after normal hours. No other attorney has ever done this for me. I recommend him highly.
Ryan assisted me with setting up and managing an LLC.  He is consistently friendly, professional and compassionate. Overall, a great person to work with.

Ryan and the team are amazing!! I have been working with Ryan for a couple years now and he is extremely knowledgeable and helpful. He charges a fair price and has helped me with family matters and my business. I am so happy to have him as my Lawyer.
Very knowledgeable and trustworthy!!
Ryan provided excellent help reviewing a real estate contract.  He also gave us advice with an employee situation we had concerns with.  We will call again when the need arises!

Working with Ryan on our estate planning was a breeze. He removed a lot of the ambiguity and complexity of the process in a really friendly and informative manner. His approach to working with us was really cordial, compassionate and professional. He helped us think through scenarios we hadn't imagined and took the time to explain complex concepts.  I would definitely recommend him to my friends and family.

We hired Ryan to write up our Wills, Power of Attorney's and a Trustee Account. He was so kind.  He even made a house call!! Can you believe that??!! A house call!! And that was at the end of a long days work!! No only did he spend his time at our house, he spent his wife's time too lol.  My husband and I both thought he was a pleasure to be around and he even had a sense of humor!!  We will definitely use him again in the future!!
Dan and Kelly Srsen

Amazing and Professional Attorney.   Very friendly and helpful office staff.  Extremely thorough with case and would highly recommend to anyone who would like to win their case.  Thank you Celia!  Appreciate ALL!
Very Professional, I highly recommend this firm. They helped me through a very difficult time!  Thanks.
Too busy to take on a new client.  Not a good choice for an office if you want any help.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback.  Unfortunately, we are not able to assist everyone who calls our firm with their case.  We are a very small law firm that prides itself on providing excellent service.  Unfortunately, this means sometimes we have to turn away clients who need help.  I wish you the best of luck finding a firm to assist you with your case.

reviews.text: Rivera Law did an excellent job on my case from beginning to end I would highly recommend them
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the kind review.  We do our best to provide excellent service.

reviews.text:
Several months after being severely injured by the neglect of a contractor, I walked into Celia Rivera's office not expecting much.
I was just hoping for a little compassion after elbow and back surgery and months of grueling PT.  It was one of the best decisions I've ever made and I'm so very grateful for Celia and her crew.  From the first visit on, they spoke honestly about whether my case was worth pursuing and what they knew would and should happen as time progressed.

Everyone at Rivera Law Offices treated me with respect and kindness.  Getting compensation took a while because of COVID but Celia and her crew carried on and I cannot thank them enough.  I hope I never need to turn to an attorney again, but should the need arise, I trust Rivera Law Offices.
reviews.ownerResponse: It was my pleasure assisting you! All my best!

reviews.text: Love this team they helped me win my car accident case with ease and they listened to my concerns, made sure I got the medical help I needed payed off, damages to my car where paid and pain and suffering. Such kind people to work with I recommend them to my friends and family best experience I have had.

Celia and her team are amazing. They really helped me through one of the most difficult of times in my life. I highly recommend Celia and her team. She always displayed such professionalism and cares about her clients.
Attorneys office that specializes in personal injury....and and are great at it. Very personalized service.

Celia and her team are the best! They’re not only professional but also excellent with communication and trustworthy. I highly recommend Celia and her team and thank them for the all they did with my case.
I loved working with Anna. She’s so nice and very caring. Very professional and answers any questions.
Extremely great service. Anna was amazing and the entire firm treated us with integrity. Extremely satisfied with my experience and if we ever need to we will surely return!

I was involved in two accidents within three  years of each other, which were not my fault. The first one was minor and unfortunately the second one was major which required me to taken to the hospital and subsequently had to have knee surgery. Rivera law offices took on my case both times. Both of the attorneys were very attentive, including gathering statements and working with the adjusters with the at  fault parties as well as their follow up to the resolution of both cases. Their paralegal was great as well in following up with questions I had and gathering all the pertinent information relating to the accidents and communicating with me. I Would definitely recommend Rivera law offices to anyone who is needing a knowledgeable, competent law firm to help you in your time of need.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review, Meeghan. It was a pleasure to work with you to resolve your claim.

reviews.text:
I cant say enough wonderful things about Ms. Rivera and her staff! They are all very knowledgeable and courteous.
They have also been very responsive to all my phone calls and e-mails. They are handling a very complicated injury claim for us and have gone above and beyond to ensure we are kept in the loop as to where things are and what we should expect moving forward. Thank you all for your hardwork!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Kristal.  Your confidence in our firm and our staff is much appreciated.

reviews.text: I Wasn't sure if they could help me with my situation or not. I explained what I was looking for and the receptionist was a bit curt, stated she wasn't sure if they could help but she would ask and get back to me. They never did.  I wouldn't  have minded if they could not help but rudeness of not having the  decency or mannerisms to contact me on that information is a practice becoming all to common in everyday life however as Professionals they should know better.
The Best

I did not think Ms. Rivera was interested or knowledgeable about product liability and resulting injuries, including mine from an office cabinet door falling on my head. In the 3 years I engaged her, 4 times she referred to my injury as resulting from a car accident. She would not tell me her legal research or strategy for my case. I did not agree to the small settlement offered and rescinded my approval. After we parted ways, my own research found that the same patented overhead flipper door had fallen off onto another worker's head in another state exactly five (5) months before one fell on me.
reviews.ownerResponse: Unfortunately, it is not possible to satisfy every client.  We strive to do our best!  Unfortunately, some cases are much more difficult than others to prove in court.

reviews.text: Celia has done an amazing job at fighting for my case and exceeding my expectations and standards. She works hard and can get the results she projects, which is definitely reassuring for anyone trying to win their case. 100/100 would recommend to anyone needing an attorney in the area.

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Erika!

reviews.text: Celia Rivera is one the most professional and knowledgeable attorneys in the State. I've been her client for years and recommend her as I know she can can get the job done.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Claudia!  Your confidence in my firm is appreciated.

reviews.text: Rivera Law is the place to go!! I have been in the world of medical massage for 15 years, and worked with many attorneys for my clients who hav even injured. I have referred both clients and my own loved ones to Celia Rivera and her Law Firm. By far, Celia Rivera and her team, meet and exceed the needs of each one. I have also turned to Celia myself for questions, even though I have not yet had to use her for myself... although should that day come, she is extremely helpful and my absolute first choice! Rivera Law treats each person as an important individual, not as a number. I am grateful for this wonderful team, and the support and encouragement Rivera Law provides for my clients and loved ones!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Jeannette.  Your confidence in me and the firm is much appreciated.

reviews.text: We had a pretty cut and dry case that turned into a nightmare because of the other party. Although it can be stressful dealing with the back and forth of insurance companies, Celia was very smart, efficient and determined to make sure the outcome was what would be the best for us, even if that meant her having other lawyers help and cutting out the profit for herself. Our case was settled and turned out better than we could have hoped for. Celia and her girls are amazing!

I want to post a review for Rivera Law offices. 3 years ago I was injured in a car wreck. It was a complicated case with some fairly severe injuries to me. I had a spinal cord injury in my cervical spine and a possible brain trauma. I have severe pain every day and limited movement of my head, neck, and arms. The back of my head still swells and I have to ice it each night.  Many more symptoms. But because I had had previous headaches, the opposing lawyers said the accident didn't affect me. Not true.  My life changed forever the day of the accident. I've seen 5 neurologists, had 3 MRI's, spinal xrays and many neurological tests showing impingements and damage.    I get pain shots weekly, have to take prednisone for inflammation, take Rx pain meds, may yet need surgery,  yet opposing lawyers said I was at fault (I wasn't!).  Anna Pierson from Rivera Law was my personal lawyer. She was relentless. Anna's knowledge of the law and her personal desire to fight for me brought the best possible result.  She proved the accident was not my fault and all medical was covered, which I didn't have to repay (yes, both medical and insurance companies can take their costs out of any proceeds you ate awarded!)  She won my case and continued litigating with medical and auto insurance even after the arbitration was completed.  I received 100% of the amount possible. I had been turned down by 2 other lawyers saying my case was too complicated.  I'm so thankful I found Rivera Law and Anna Pierson!  She sincerely cared about me as a person!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Connie.  It was our pleasure helping with this complicated case.

reviews.text: When I got into my accident in 2015, I called Rivera Law firm explained my situation and because I was not able to meet with them in their office to discuss further due to pain, they made it convenient and with peace of mind to come to me.  They are very friendly and professional firm and would highly recommend them.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you Maria!

reviews.text: I was recommended to this firm after an auto injury by someone who had a great experience. I had the opposite. I found them to be highly unorganized and often confusing. Celia quite often called me by the wrong first name (which was insulting after a year on my case and gave the impression I wasn’t receiving the attention my case deserved) and there are STILL unresolved issues with my insurance to this day (case closed months ago), to which I have to keep following up with them on. I also never saw the final offer officially documented by the insurance company who offered it, which I found odd. There are lots of attorneys to choose from and I personally would not recommend based off my experience.
reviews.ownerResponse: While we strive for excellent customer service, some things are outside of our control. I am sorry you are still having trouble with your health insurance. Unfortunately, you have not brought this to our attention so that we can assist you. I am surprised you learn you don't feel like you never saw the final offer. The "Release" is a document you signed created by the insurance company.  Please feel free to contact me so that we can address your health insurance.

reviews.text: At one of the most trying times in my life, these folks were there to help me, even though it was my parents who were their clients. Highly recommend you give them a call when you need representation.
Jeffrey Carr and Lata Pitolau delivered the goods.  If I had it to do over I would hire them again.  In fact,  I plan to keep them on retainer... just in case.

Clint and Stacey were very supportive through the whole process of having a trust done for my mother. We are now working with them on probate for my brother's estate. Would definitely recommend Morgan Hill to anyone.

The absolute best option.  Honest, knowledgeable, caring.  Rib Hill,  Clint Morgan and team have assisted me in various legal needs for over a decade .  From a divorce and child custody situation,  legal assistance with my company , to helping my mother set up her will.  Always a favorable satisfactory outcome.   I know I can always count on them which brings me great peace of mind.
I have relied upon Morgan Hill to help me through multiple legal situations over the years.  It's been a great experience every time!!

During the grief and loss of a loved one having someone you can depend on is very important … I had such a wonderful experience with an estate that I also used there services to create will’s and power of attorney paperwork as well!!

Definitely worth the phone call yourself….;)

Great service from Morgan Hill!  I’ve used them twice now for domestic issues and have been more than satisfied each time.  Paralegal Lita P and Attorney Jeff C did great work, moving quickly and getting to yes. I appreciate the help greatly!  I will use the again for any future domestic problems.

I would not recommend working with Morgan Hill based on my experience. My first attorney did not respond to messages for months and was later no longer with the firm. The replacement attorney was responsive but appeared overextended. I needed independent support on a complex legal matter, but instead I found myself managing the process. After spending a significant amount of money, there was no meaningful progress or resolution. I’m disappointed in the cost, but more disappointed that the firm couldn’t deliver on what I needed. It is worth noting that there was no opposing party in my case, it was a legal matter all parties supported.
Thank you Stacey for your help
Jeff has earned a 5 star review for winning the case to protect kids from and abusive situation.

I was highly satisfied with my time spent receiving legal services from Morgan Hill.

I originally met with Clint, and later was assigned Attorney Kara Palmer, and paralegal, Lanea Kalcso.

My time spent with Kara and Lanea was nothing shy of helpful, and professional.

Kara and Lanea walked me through the whole process, explained it all in detail, and did what was in their power to help me along with my case.

I couldn’t have asked for better help.

I would highly recommend Morgan Hill for your legal service needs, and especially Attorney Kara, and Paralegal Lanea Kalcso for family law needs.

Mr. Carr was co-counsel on my minor guardianship case for my nieces and he did a phenomenal job. His presentation, questions, and cross examination of witnesses were outstanding. He really fought hard alongside my Attorney Ms. Julia Yetter for my nieces’ best interests.
Thank you Jeff your the best.

Nothing short of amazing! I hired Rob Hill for my divorce with children. He is extremely knowledgeable and tactful with his approach. At times where I was taking fire from the other side and wanted to fire back, he helped me stay calm and focus on the big picture. He's a master strategist and from day one through 5 years of nasty mudslinging that ended in trial, he always helped me stick to the plan adjusting as necessary. During the most stressful and scary experience of my life, he helped me protect my young children and avoid falling for her traps. The result was a divorce trial that ruled in my favor in every single facet including most importantly full custody of my 5/8 yr old children (new born/3 when the divorce started), multiple bogus DVPO claims by her were all denied, all real property retained, fair child support ordered to be paid to me, all past debts of over 40k ordered to be paid to me and almost 35k in attorney fees ordered to be paid to me. This ruling was a miracle in my opinion and was delivered from the court on my 45th birthday. If you want someone who will fight in a smart strategic way to help you protect what matters most to you, Rob is your guy! I couldn't recommend him any higher!
Clint and Stacey and Wendy were fun to work with through the trust process, and they were very responsive to our many questions and clarifications!

Clint has been an amazing help with our wills and estate planning. He is extremely knowledgeable. What we enjoyed most was feeling at ease and comfortable with his casual demeanor, which is very refreshing and appreciated. I would highly recommend Clint Morgan for all of your legal needs.
Clint Morgan did our wills and the work was well done, very  professional.   Clint is very personable and caring as a person as well as a fine attorney.

I was very happy with the legal services I received.  I met with Clint Morgan originally for help with probate.  He was helpful, knowledgeable and walked me through the process.  I later consulted him on setting up a trust.  Again, along with his paralegal, Stacey, he guided me in accomplishing my intended goals.  Clint and Stacey were a great team, answering my questions and taking care that the documents were handled professionally and timely.  It was a pleasure working with them. I would definitely recommend them and will call on them for any future legal needs.

My wife and I reached out to Clint at Morgan Hill at the urging of a family member after my mother-in-law had passed. Clint was responsive and within a week I was driving up to Olympia from Tri-Cities to hand off all necessary documentation to them. They remained in constant contact with us throughout the lengthy process and were able to get everything sorted out with the estate. They really took the massive headache out of navigating the legal system.
Most professional experience I've had. They are very patient and accommodating.

This Office has been my Legal team since the 90's, extremely professional, caring, helpful helping navigate legal matters with their  extensive knowledge.

Clint Morgan, Stacey and their Team are great .
Great service, easy to work with! Highly recommend!

Jeffrey Carr and his Paralegal, Lata, were great to work with during some very difficult times. Jeff is definitely an advocate for his client. After looking around Olympia, I  am glad we landed at this firm.

I hired Robert Hill for my case and he will be the person I go to for anything I have like this in the future. I trust him 100% and his team (Alisa Everson). Having an attorney who I can trust completely, next to me in court is worth far more than money. Robert and his team listened to my side of things and by the time I was even part way through explaining, they had a better grasp of my situation than I did. To have someone who understands me to the depth Robert does is something I didn't know was possible for someone I had just met. In the court room he represented himself and I professionally and confidently. He has an impressive and almost undescribable ability to adapt to conversations and questions in court. I could say a lot more but in the end, the time Robert and his team have gotten me with my kids and the relationship I am now able to have with my kids speaks for itself.

I thought they were great at 1st, but as soon as it became clear i might not win my attorney left the case. And right as the case was ending. I didn't receive any real guidance and wasn't heard when it came to the things I wanted brought up in court. Because of this, and many other failures to take charge of the case, lives have been ruined and I dont know if they can ever be fixed. My heart will be forever broken because of the lawyer I paid there
Outstanding, professional representation by Attorney Kara Palmer. Responsive and thorough.

I hired Jeffery Carr for a Protection Order case. He was disruptive during an emotional sensitive hearing that was before my case, the judge had to stop and tell him to be quiet while walking in the courtroom, talking loudly to one of his colleagues.

During my case, I had substantial video evidence for my case but somehow the judge took the other party’s testimony as evidence over my physical evidence.

Jeffery Carr told me we need to do a revision hearing but failed to tell me how much it would cost me and that the judge is bound by the findings of the commissioner judge. And on top of that I was charged twice because there were two POs, both against eachother.

They are quick to put a judgment against you if you don’t pay their expensive lawyer fees and they double charged me for the same work because there were “two” POs.

So I ended up $15,000+ in the hole (after negotiating) with nothing to show for it other than being homeless, living in a car, having to take & pay for weekly classes for the next year, and paying rent and bills for a house I cannot go to, and seeing my kids twice a week.

Thanks Morgan Hill for ruining my life and not fighting for me. If you cared about the injustice that happened to me, y’all would have fought for me.

Also, Jeffery Carr wanted me to make some fake receipts to show that I had “paid” for a supervisor during visitation with my kids, when I used a mutual friend for free. I told him no and fired him after that.

The only people that seemed to help me was Lata and Vikki.
Very honest and truthful law firm. Average cost. Very thorough

Had a mediation appointment this past friday with Clint who was the perfect fit on guiding us through the process. And even before the meeting Stacey one of the paralegals was absolutely fantastic too! 100% reccomend!
I had a great meeting with Clint Morgan. He evaluated my complicated situation and we came up with a path forward. I highly recommend.

Do not use this law firm. The staff are unprofessional and unresponsive. My case is unresolved and year later and I have to bug them to get updates and ask about next steps instead of them keeping me updated. Waste of money and time. Very unhappy
reviews.ownerResponse: Dear Amanda, we know how frustrating family law can be, for so many reasons.  Our goal is to make it less frustrating.  One of the ways we do that is to stay in communication with our clients about their case as often as needed and sometimes even more.  But we also want to be mindful about rising costs in a case.  We apologize that you felt we were unresponsive.  We take your words to heart and would invite you to call and speak with a partner attorney again if you have additional suggestions on what more communication you feel would have been more helpful.  As you know, we do believe your case is resolved, but a statewide court system is down, preventing us and every other law firm from final steps in our cases.  You remain a top priority so you and your family can move forward with peace.

reviews.text: Quick, Affordable, Intelligent, Honest.  It was everything I could've asked for.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Nathan!

reviews.text:
I was very impressed to receive a call back from the Morgan Hill firm.  They were the only firm out of 9 to even return my call. I was given an appointment within 4 days.  Impressive!

I was pleasantly greeted as I walked in the door.  I then met with Clint Morgan.  He actively listened and showed sincere compassion.   He provided me with the information I needed in a concise, logical, helpful way that I could easily understand.  He then encouraged me to think it over and didn't pressure me in any way.

I was impressed with my entire experience and would highly recommend the Morgan Hill firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thanks, Diane! We really appreciate your confidence in our firm!

reviews.text:
Don’t hire this law firm, very bad experience! I just looked for legal advice but they told me what is right morally. It’s ridiculous as they are law firm! How can they judge a case that easily and subjectively? It is NOT professional at all!
---------------
update: I just saw the owner's response. I don't want to waste too much time. I just want to say what the owner said is not true. I don't know them before I called, there's no reason to "curse the receptionist immediately". Please be logical! That's it!
reviews.ownerResponse:
This woman called our law firm and immediately began cursing our receptionist when she sent her to the person who would schedule her for an appointment, instead of immediately to an attorney. She then began screaming at the intake person that they "better not waste my time b****" and she needed to be transferred to an attorney. Our intake person offered to schedule her with one of our attorneys, but when this woman found out she would have to pay to meet with an attorney, she demanded to be given free services and so we offered to give her a referral to a pro bono attorney who could help her based on income. She then became incensed that we thought she needed financial help and said she would never work with us.
Unfortunately, we were unable to provide her with any answers. No legal advice was provided, nor did we review her situation. We know that when people call us, they are already having a hard time and so we treat them with compassion. Unfortunately, we were unable to provide this client with help. We hope she finds the answers she seeks and wish her well.

reviews.text: My Family and I have had Clint Morgan assist us with family law issues several times in the last couple years and I Just can’t really express how helpful he has been for us?  Clint listens and then takes action to accomplish what ever our need has been.    His staff is very attentive and helpful as well.   You will be in good hands if you need some legal advice or help with Morgan Hill Law.

If I could give these guys a negative five stars I would. Lily said that she did not need to show up for a hearing and my ex had her attorney there and I lost. I spent over $7,000 and they did not submit anything to defend me. I repeatedly asked for a game plan and how they would defend me and I got nothing except a big Bill. I asked multiple times for them to send messages and notifications to opposing counsel and they did not. They wrote letters the opposing counsel would not accept because they said it was third-party contact, but I was billed for these. Do yourself a favor and find another firm these guys are absolutely horrible. They do not keep you informed at all. You will have to call in and email them multiple times, getting billed $35 to $150 for each request, and you will still get nothing.

Well if the Attorneys are as good as their Paralegals MRS. Shimomae is leading me to believe Morgan Hill is a firm that can handle complex cases and cares for their clients. The biggest problem I have faced with current counsel lack of care and communication. Mrs. Shimomae gave me a feel that Morgan Hill communication and knowledge of Military is top notch. Tomorrow I, have a in person consolation so far I, have not experienced this level of professionalism I, have checked 47 firms around Thurston county. If I were you it’s worth a sit down if you don’t feel confident with your current Attorney. This was a five star post.

Regret to say the handling of my case has been terrible. There was so much miscommunication. Things where ether not addressed or mishandled. My paralegal on my case abruptly left who I felt was very professional. My attorney appeared to be working closely with opposing counsel. He even asked me to dismiss the GAL due to how she spoke to and emailed opposing counsel. I and my family have to suffer. Standing my ground hold him accountable he has chosen to withdraw overall little to nothing was done correctly he would suggest one thing then try and word smith he did not even though emails of his proves otherwise. He even assumed that I did not want visitation with my children during a visit home first time after 13 years due to a medical emergency amazingly responded right after 15 mins past my normal visi time. But Did not respond to an email 17 hours before to right his wrong and I’m sure to be charged for all of this. Most of the emails I sent where follow ups that need further follow ups and instead I receive witty excuses, accountability one minute and denial the next or blame. I, would like to say Mr. Hill seemed very knowledgeable not all his attorneys are firing on all cylinders. I, don’t even know if there are good attorneys in thurston county at this point. I have evidence, text, video, have not seen my kids coming up on a year. I could really use someone to do the right thing here. Surely is not Morgan Hill. The only thing I want is justice and people to be professional work the case. It’s very sad to say but so far it would appear people care more about taking money than doing the right thing.

As a father, family court feels impossible more times than not, but I knew Morgan Hill was the right choice to get my son and I safe.

There was a conflict of interest due to who was over our case used to work there (something I wasn't willing to lose due to them being so fair and having strong integrity and awareness), but while I couldn't retain anyone at Morgan Hill for that reason, that didn't stop them from going above and beyond for someone who wasn't even their client.

Grace in particular listened, was empathic and kind, realistic, had amazing conduct, and multiple times helped me with (great) referrals and even answered my adjacent questions. Even though I couldn't be a client there, Grace did more for me and my child than some attorneys in the past have. Truly outstanding.

That's how they are with non-clients, without a doubt if you become a client of theirs, you'll not regret it.
reviews.ownerResponse: I can't tell you how much it means to hear this, thank you. We're just glad you were able to get things taken care of during a difficult time.

I recently received a cease and desist letter from Mr. Vanderpol at Goldstein Law Office PLLC, claiming that my actions made his clients feel uncomfortable and unsafe. Unfortunately, this letter was sent without a full understanding of the situation. I manage multiple disabilities, including intractable tremors and myoclonic jerks, which cause uncontrollable physical movements. These were not considered or discussed before the letter was issued, leading to what felt like a discriminatory assumption about my behavior.

This experience was disheartening, as a brief conversation or inquiry could have clarified the situation and avoided unnecessary escalation. I urge Mr. Vanderpol and the firm to take the time to fully understand the context of a case, especially when disabilities may be involved, to prevent similar misunderstandings.

I am open to revising or removing this review if Mr. Vanderpol or the firm addresses my concerns and demonstrates a commitment to more thorough and inclusive communication in the future.

reviews.ownerResponse: We are very sorry that this former client had a bad experience with our office, but we feel it is important to clear up a few inaccurate statements. Jane was the 6th and final lawyer I contacted with regards to my unusual, long and arduous immigration process. She is a true blessing and helped me to successfully get my green card.

I started my process filing the paperwork by myself without a lawyer. That was a huge mistake because it led to a series of issues that delayed my process over and over again. All this could have been avoided if I had a good lawyer from the start.

When it was my time to change status I decided to do it with a lawyer. I went through 5 lawyers before finding Jane. The first gave me wrong information that delayed my process even more. The second was reluctant to work with me. The third said he wasn't qualified to deal with my case. He referred me to a 4th lawyer who was more knowledgeable, she consulted me but didn't take my case.

When I finally found a lawyer that was knowledgeable, willing to take my case and was even a bit more affordable than the others, he asked me to fill out the forms by myself and drop in his office for him to file. When I had questions about the forms, he wouldn't take my calls. Needless to say I was feeling stressed and desperate and at this point I didn't know if it's possible for me to complete my process.

When I finally found Jane, it was like finding a helping angel. She is knowledgeable, professional, meticulous in her work and super calm. She guided me every step of the way and took care of the paperwork. Her calm manner, clarity and focus helped me to relax and get things done on my end. She was on top of everything, super responsive to all messages and made sure we met all the deadlines, which I wouldn't be able to do without her.

Towards the end of the process, we had to handle one last thing related to my religious beliefs. She wasn't experienced with that unusual exception but made immediate inquiries and came back with clear guidance that allowed us to complete the process successfully.

She came with us to the interview and her calm presence was very supportive. Looking back at this journey I only wish I would have started my process with Jane or found her sooner. That would have saved me much time, stress and money.

Jane is a genuine gem of a lawyer. If you need a professional, knowledgeable lawyer with excellent communication skills, that will have your back every step of the way and give you a great chance at successful outcome, I highly recommend choosing Jane.

reviews.text: Bret has an unwavering commitment to justice. Whether it’s crafting a strategic defense or understanding the nuances of each case, he shows a level of diligence and attention to detail that is commendable. We worked on multiple cases together over the years and I am impressed every time.

Excellent Labor and Industry attorney's. My state worker was a complete and total nightmare to deal with until I hire these nice people. They had it resolved in less than 30 days and I have had no more issues because they do not want to fight with these people. ❤️❤️❤️
They ghosted my husband. Gave him a small portion of his money and kept the rest. Won't return calls or emails. Won't forward any documents. Ghosted.

I am leaving this review on behalf of person (firefighter) close to me who wishes to remain anonymous. I listened the phone call consultation personally on speaker phone that they had with a lawyer from this firm and I was absolutely shocked and disgusted with the lack of empathy and professionalism demonstrated by the lawyer on the other end of the phone representing this firm. It’s absolutely clear to me that there is no other motivation here other than to make money off of the pain and suffering of our first responders, as opposed to ethically doing what is right and doing what ever it takes to help them with their respective cases. After a short conversation, when the lawyer realized that their potential client’s case was complex, and might require some actual work, they were quick to dismiss the case and refused to help this fire fighter who is in serious need of legal assistance. What a shame, and blatant disrespect for 20+ year public servant who is need of legal assistance. In my opinion, and at the very least the individual lawyer involved, is morally and ethically unfit to serve in this capacity.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback.  There are many factors that determine whether we are able to assist in a worker compensation claim and we are not always able to represent everyone that reaches out for our assistance.  We commend all our first responders including those we are unable to directly represent.

reviews.text: I would give zero starts if I could. If you’re a first responder that has complex ptsd from on the job after 20 years of service do not call here. It will just make your ptsd worse. I was totally dismissed by Brandy one of the lawyers here. Even after I spent six hours working on an email for my timeline of events to come organized for the meeting which she didn’t even bother looking at. Literally spent 3 minutes on the phone telling me she will not take my case because I have two claims one for reopening an injury on the job that was never fixed and the other a new one for occupational disease from ptsd. I don’t even know why they advertise on their website they help firefighters.  It’s so heartbreaking to be treated that way and dismiss as ptsd already has stigma surrounding it. People wonder why the suicide rate is so high with veterans and first responders because their service and sacrifice’s are dismissed and forgotten. Shame on this law firm it would have just been better to hear they aren’t taking new clients because of their case load which is more than likely focused on car accident's so they can win more money.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for sharing your feedback.  We strive to help everyone that can benefit from our legal representation.  Although we are unable to assist you in your matter, we do wish you well in your recovery.

reviews.text:
I was disabled from a work injury 2 years ago. I can't say thank you enough for Laura stepping in to help. A life changer!  She is always asking and willing to help
I thought I left a review post in 2019. Anyway, now it has been 8 years since My accident at work. Laura and Angie have been helping me and I can say they have been always for me in my corner. They are completely trustworthy and reliable.
This law firm is very impressive and they are concenciuos of your needs and feelings, very knowledgeable and a place to trust.

DO NOT HAVE THEM REPRESENT YOU.
If I could give a negative 5 star I would they do not even deserve 1 star my husband went there with a serious injury to his back and stomach from being squished and penned against a machine that luckily didn’t kill him. We went to this place to get an attorney for professional help and got not one bit of professional help first off the attorney, Laura, Fedorko has very poor communication, she excepted my husband’s case and I feel like she didn’t do anything, except for maybe dispute a denial, but other than that was just sitting around like ducks, waiting for whatever to happen instead of fighting for her client like she should when my husband and I went into the office, to take bills that we are receiving from his injury, and give them updated APF papers for work they would get upset. The lady that works at the front decided it would be OK to holler at my husband when he was trying to talk and practically tell him to shut up not giving him a chance to say what he wanted to say after she told him that he had to pay his bills  from the work injury, which is not our responsibility after that situation, Laura decided she was going to have her translator call to make an appointment not to give us updates on the case but to tell my husband that his wife is no longer allowed  to have anything to do with his case no communications to help make things easier because I told her assistant upfront not to raise her voice and holler at my husband like that again to act professional, like she should and to tell her own client that he cannot go into the office or call that he had to go through a translator named Carlos and when he tried going through the translator, he would always have attitude as well and his response would be I don’t know I’m not a lawyer but then not even relay much of anything to the Laura so with that being said there is so much more but I don’t wanna get into everything however, if you’re looking for a professional attorney to help you in the situation that you are in DEFINITELY DO NO GO THROUGH PUTNAM  you need somebody that is going to be more understanding more caring about their clients, more communicating and help their client get what they need and deserve you will not get that from this place  and if you decide to go through them good luck hopefully you have better luck than we did. The only two times she made an appointment was because she wanted to vent because we were calling to try to find out if there was any new news on the case and that upset them Because apparently clients should not call or know any new updates or anything with your case you just need to give it to him and let it sit for who knows how many years because it’s a long process she says it makes it even longer when you don’t do anything to try to speed things up so if you decide to go with them, good luck, God bless and I hope you the best of luck

Thanks for nothing Putnam Law

Update PALACE LAW IS AMAZING WE HAVE GOTTEN SO MUCH HELP AND YOU ARE APPRECIATED THERE AND RESPECTED I WOULD RECOMMEND TO EVERYONE PALACE LAW IN TACOMA GOOD LUCK AND GOD BLESS
Good staff

reviews.text: Dealing with a horrible company that handles injuries I was recommended to seek out Putnam and Lieb. They have been absolutely amazing to my family. Laura has been my attorney since the case began and she always helps with questions and concerns. She will walk you through all of the difficult steps with a smile and positive attitude. I couldn't thank her enough on how much she's helped my family. If you get injured on the job call them immediately!
I've been so greatful for all the hard work and help from Laura and her team. They are always so kind and quick to address and questions or concerns. I don't think I could thank them enough.

I had a life changing brain injury that put a screeching halt to my professional life. Laura  Fedorko at Putnam Lieb has been amazing. She has helped my wife and I navigate through a complex claim and helped us through a very challenging life event. Laura has always made herself available when we have questions and she obviously knows her way around the process and practices of the L&I system.

Have the best team in your corner.  They made the process smooth and easy.  Recovered more than I was hoping or expecting.  Everyone was polite and timely with all communication from beginning to end.  I would highly recommend Putnam Lieb Potvin Dailey.  Special thanks to Laura.  A+

I cannot express enough gratitude for the outstanding legal services provided by Dustin, and Brandi.

Firstly, Dustin displayed unparalleled professionalism coupled with genuine care for my situation. He went above and beyond to ensure that I understood every step of the legal process and tirelessly fought for me. His dedication to achieving the best possible outcome for me was truly remarkable.

Equally if not more impressive was Brandi who worked alongside Dustin. Brandi's compassion and dedication to her clients sets a new standard in the legal field. Not only is she highly knowledgeable and efficient, but she also demonstrates a sincere interest in my well-being throughout the entire process. Brandi is always available to address my concerns and answer any questions.  Brandi is there every step of the way and is the caring voice that helps you throughout the stressful experience.

Together, this legal team exemplifies excellence. Their unwavering commitment to their clients' needs sets them apart from the rest. I wholeheartedly recommend this Brandi and Dustin to anyone seeking top-notch legal representation with a personal touch. Thank you for your exceptional service and genuine care.
They care about their clients , and they are passionate about what they do..very straight up about everything. They can be trusted

Used their free consultation button on website on 3 separate occasions but heard nothing. Called and made an appointment for 2 weeks out, sent on paperwork a week ahead of my appointment, received a call on Friday to confirm my Monday appointment.  At the confirmation call I verified they received all documents.  Monday I received a call and that's when they informed me that since the person that hit me worked in their office they said it was a conflict on interest.  It would have been nice to know that a week ago and not day of.  I would not recommend this office nor their referrals.  Why didn't they review paperwork ahead of time?
Excellent law firm for your L&I claims.
Great Attorney Dustin Dailey, I'd recommend him to anyone. He's great and he won my case for me 3 years ago.

Putnam and Lieb is an amazing law firm! Dustin handled my LNI case from beginning to end an assured that the state stayed and maintained prompt response when dealing with my medical providers. My case took almost four years including needing  surgery and having recovery along with physical therapy at which Putnam and Lieb was always in my corner during the process. They took a burden off of me from nuisant state forms that LNI would resently send again and again along with their rediculose request, and made the transition for healing with sanity easier so that I was able to get back in a working state faster. This was all done through the times of covid; this truly is an organization that cares for you as an individual.

I could not be more disappointed. They will do anything to earn your business but once they have your money they completely leave you hanging. I have been trying to finalize my case with this business for MONTHS. There is no follow through. It’s impossible to get ahold of anyone who will even speak to me with answers and when I do- they don’t follow through as I mentioned. I have not cashed/deposited 1 check in trying to figure out what to do…. And now I recieve a $4000 bill for “over payment.” This place only cares about money, not about the client.

I called them because I heard an ad on the radio and I was having problems with an accident that involved my father they didn't handle my case but they did put me in the right direction to go about what I needed to have done and so that was a big help and it did work out in our behalf
Compassionate and straightforward .. Kathy is someone that if you have in your corner she fights and she's damn good at it

Contacting Putnam Lieb Potvin Dailey was the best decision I could of ever made. They helped me through a period of time that I thought was a lost cause.  They are super friendly, direct, and all around superheroes. Would recommend them over and over again! 10 out of 10 would buy them all donuts 🍩
My attorney is Dustin Daily and he truly cares for his clients. I am grateful and thankful for their service. A Hell Yeah! to Pat. Thank you girl. I know how busy you are.

reviews.text: Very clean, friendly and professional. Fantastic service!
They have been a Godsend for me. Labor and Industry would deny every single thing, if it weren't for Kathryn Potvin I would still be broken and in need of repairs.

It is hard to find out that you have a health problem. It is far more difficult to realize that your condition was caused by your work that you did in the past or currently performing. It is devastating when you find out that the health problem is rejected as a claim, when you trying to file it.

I was referred to Putnam, Lieb and Potvin about three years ago by a friend. I had never dealt with the law office in this type of situation. Well in any kind of situation, other than my divorce.
Full of unknowns and lots of reservations I stepped into my first initial interview with Mr. Dustin Dailey.
Right from the start, Dustin explained to me what to expect. His presence in the room and temperament were both - reassuring and trust-building.
It felt like he knew exactly what he was talking about and that feeling transferred over.
I am not saying that it was easy to go through this journey. I  am truly saying that it was worth it, every step of the way.

I will not give out details of my three year journey with Dustin and his staff.
All I am going to say is that I felt welcomed at the office if I had to be there and every single time of my interactions with Dustin Dailey or his staff were confidence building and down to earth.

I have met Mr. Putnam in person one time as well. Just en-passing. We talked a little and it felt like home, no stigma of a law office attached. Just two people talking.

There is much more I would like to say, but within the constraints of this review I want to sum it up like this.
I trusted Dustin Dailey with my health, career and finances - as my claim directly or indirectly was connected to all of the above.
He delivered and I recently found out that his name is now is part of the firm - Putnam, Lieb, Potvin and Dailey.

Congratulations Mr. Dailey, well earned!

In the end, if God forbid I need to deal with something like this again or I know someone I care about who is going through similar experiences - I will, without a hesitation, recommend them to talk to Putnam, Lieb, Potvin and Dailey.

Thank you.

When I was hurt at work I was referred to this firm by a friend and Laura took my case. I couldn't be happier with her work. Within days Laura had corrected mistakes I had already made that would have come back to be a problem. My employer was represented by an aggressive firm and there was no way I could have navigated the complexity of the L&I claim without Laura's assistance.

My friend suggested this firm to me.  He said they really made a difference in his wife’s case.  They were not able to help me thought.   Meaning they wouldn’t take my case on.  Don’t really understand why,  I had a very serious injury and have an open L & I claim.  I thought thats wh
